entry.title: About Map Put Versus PutIfAbsent
entry.content:
About Map Put Versus PutIfAbsent

About Map Put Versus PutIfAbsent

Versus

V put(K key, V value);
ТёЈуЙЕтдѓСИІ
return map.put(key, value);

V putIfAbsent(K key, V value);
ТёЈуЙЕтдѓСИІ
if (!map.containsKey(key)) {
return map.put(key, value);
} else {
return map.get(key);
}

favor defining classes over interfaces.
use abstract classes instead of interfaces to decouple the contract from implementations.

entry.title: Intro Amazon WorkSpaces
entry.content:
Intro Amazon WorkSpaces

Amazon WorkSpaces Тў»т«ЅтЁеСИћтЈЌу«АуџёТАїжЮбтЇ│ТюЇтІЎ (DaaS) УДБТ▒║Тќ╣ТАѕсђѓ
ТѓетЈ»С╗ЦСй┐уће Amazon WorkSpaces тюет╣ЙтѕєжљўтЁДСйѕт╗║ Windows Тѕќ Linux ТАїжЮб№╝їСИдт┐ФжђЪтю░ТЊ┤т▒Ћ№╝їуѓ║тЁеуљЃтиЦСйюУђЁТЈљСЙЏТЋИтЇЃтђІТАїжЮбсђѓ

тіЪУЃй:

Amazon WorkSpaces ТЈљСЙЏС║єСИђуе«у░АСЙ┐уџёТќ╣т╝Ј№╝їуѓ║ТѓеуџёТюђухѓСй┐ућеУђЁТЈљСЙЏт«ЅтЁеСИћтЈЌу«АуџёжЏ▓уФ»УЎЏТЊгТАїжЮбуњ░тбЃжФћжЕЌсђѓ
УѕЄтѓ│ух▒уЈЙта┤жЃеуй▓УЎЏТЊгТАїжЮбтЪ║уцјУеГТќй (VDI) УДБТ▒║Тќ╣ТАѕСИЇтљїС╣ІУЎЋтюеТќ╝№╝їТѓеСИЇжюђУдЂТЊћт┐ЃТјАУ│╝сђЂжЃеуй▓тњїу«АуљєУцЄжЏюуџёуњ░тбЃ№╝ї
Amazon WorkSpaces ТюЃТїЉУхижђЎС║ЏжЄЇТЊћ№╝їСИдТЈљСЙЏтЁетЈЌу«АуџёТюЇтІЎсђѓТюЅС║є Amazon WorkSpaces№╝їТѓетЈ»С╗ЦС║цС╗ўжФўтЊЂУ│фуџёУАїтІЋТАїжЮбтњїТЄЅућеуеІт╝ЈухдСй┐ућеУђЁУЄфти▒жЂИТЊЄуџёУБЮуй«сђѓ

уёАУФќТѓеТў»у«Ауљєтѓ│ух▒уџёТАїжЮб№╝їжѓёТў»у«АуљєжЄЮт░ЇУЎЏТЊгТАїжЮбтЪ║уцјУеГТќй (VDI) УђїжќІуЎ╝уџёуЈЙта┤жЃеуй▓УДБТ▒║Тќ╣ТАѕ№╝їСИЇу«АтЊфСИђуе«жЃйжюђУдЂтцДжЄЈуџёУ│ЄжЄЉТіЋтЁЦ№╝ї
УђїСИћжЃеуй▓тњїу«АуљєтиЦСйюжђџтИИжЃйТ»ћУ╝ЃтЏ░жЏБсђѓТјАућеС╗ЦжЏ▓уФ»уѓ║тЪ║уцјуџёУЎЏТЊгТАїжЮбуњ░тбЃ№╝їСИЇжюђУдЂтЅЇТюЪТіЋУ│Є№╝їС╣ЪСИЇжюђт░ЇтЪ║уцјУеГТќйжђ▓УАїТїЂу║їу«Ауљє№╝ї
жѓёУЃйтцаУ«ЊТѓеС╗Цу░Атќ«сђЂуХЊТ┐Ът»дТЃауџёТќ╣т╝Јуѓ║ТѓеуџёСй┐ућеУђЁТЈљСЙЏт«ЅтЁеСИћтЁиТюЅУ▒љт»їтГўтЈќжЂИжаЁуџёТАїжЮбжФћжЕЌсђѓ

СИ▓ТхЂтЇћт«џ:

Amazon WorkSpaces тѕЕућеСИ▓ТхЂтЇћт«џуѓ║Сй┐ућеУђЁТЈљСЙЏт«ЅтЁетњїжФўтЊЂУ│фуџёжФћжЕЌсђѓжђЎС║ЏтЇћт«џтЈ»тѕєТъљУеЌу«АуџёТАїСИітъІжЏ╗УЁдсђЂуХ▓Уи»тњїСй┐ућеУђЁУБЮуй«№╝ї
С╗ЦжЂИТЊЄтБЊуИ«тњїУДБтБЊуИ«Т╝ћу«ЌТ│Ћ (УйЅуб╝тЎе)№╝їжђЎС║ЏТ╝ћу«ЌТ│ЋТюЃт░ЇСй┐ућеУђЁТАїСИітъІжЏ╗УЁдуџёУйЅУГ»жђ▓УАїуиеуб╝№╝їСИдт░ЄтЁХС╗ЦтЃЈу┤аСИ▓ТхЂТќ╣т╝Јтѓ│У╝ИУЄ│Сй┐ућеУђЁУБЮуй«сђѓ
Amazon WorkSpaces жаљУеГСйхтЁЦ Teradici уџё PC-over-IP (PCoIP) СИ▓ТхЂтЇћт«џсђѓ

Сй┐ућеУЄфТюЅТјѕТгі:

ТѓетЈ»С╗Цт░ЄуЈЙТюЅуџё Windows 10 ТАїжЮбТјѕТгітИХтѕ░ Amazon WorkSpaces№╝їуёХтЙїтюеТѓет░ѕт▒гуџёт»джФћуАгжФћСИітЪиУАїт«ЃтђЉсђѓ
уЋХТѓет░ЄуЈЙТюЅуџё Windows ТјѕТгітИХтѕ░ WorkSpaces ТЎѓ№╝їуЏИУ╝ЃТќ╝ти▓тїЁтљФТќ░ Windows ТјѕТгіуџё WorkSpaces№╝ї
тЈ»С╗Цу»ђуюЂжФўжЂћ 16% (Т»ЈтђІ WorkSpace Т»ЈТюѕ 4 USD)сђѓУІЦУдЂугдтљѕУ│ЄТа╝№╝їТѓеуџёухёу╣ћт┐Ёжаѕугдтљѕ Microsoft УеГт«џуџёТјѕТгіУдЂТ▒ѓ№╝ї
УђїСИћт┐ЁжаѕТЅ┐УФЙТ»ЈтђІТюѕтюеТїЄт«џуџё AWS тЇђтЪЪУЄ│т░ЉтЪиУАї 200 тђІ Amazon WorkSpacesсђѓ

Тќ╣СЙ┐Сйѕт╗║:

жђЈжЂј Amazon WorkSpaces Сйѕт╗║ТАїжЮбжЮътИИТќ╣СЙ┐сђѓуёАУФќТѓежЂИТЊЄУдЂтЋЪтІЋСИђТѕќтцџтђІ Amazon WorkSpaces№╝ї
тЈфжюђУдЂжЂИТЊЄТюђугдтљѕСй┐ућеУђЁжюђУдЂуџёТюЇтІЎтїЁ№╝їС╗ЦтЈіУдЂтЋЪтІЋуџё Amazon WorkSpaces ТЋИжЄЈтЇ│тЈ»сђѓ
Amazon WorkSpaces Сйѕт╗║т«їТѕљС╣ІтЙї№╝їСй┐ућеУђЁТюЃТћХтѕ░СИђт░ЂжЏ╗тГљжЃхС╗Х№╝ї
тЁХСИГТЈљСЙЏСйЋУЎЋтЈ»СИІУ╝ЅТЅђжюђуџё Amazon WorkSpaces ућеТѕХуФ»ТЄЅућеуеІт╝ЈтњїтдѓСйЋжђБТјЦ Amazon WorkSpace уџёТїЄуц║сђѓ
уЋХТѓеСИЇтєЇжюђУдЂуЅ╣т«џуџё Amazon WorkSpace ТЎѓ№╝їтЈ»С╗ЦУ╝ЋжгєтѕфжЎцт«Ѓсђѓ

т«ЅтЁеСИћти▓тіат»є:

Amazon WorkSpaces ТЈљСЙЏжФўтЊЂУ│фуџёТАїжЮбжФћжЕЌ№╝їтЇћтіЕТѓеугдтљѕтљѕУдЈУѕЄт«ЅтЁеУдЂТ▒ѓ№╝їтїЁТІг HIPAA У│ЄТа╝тњї PCI тљѕУдЈсђѓ
Сй┐уће WorkSpaces ТЎѓ№╝їухёу╣ћуџёУ│ЄТќЎСИЇТюЃуЎ╝жђЂТѕќтГўТћЙтѕ░ТюђухѓСй┐ућеУђЁуџёУБЮуй«СИісђѓWorkSpaces Сй┐ућеуџё PC-over-IP (PCoIP) жЂауФ»жА»уц║тЇћт«џуѓ║Сй┐ућеУђЁТЈљСЙЏуєЪТѓЅуџёТАїжЮбжФћжЕЌ№╝ї
тљїТЎѓт░ЄУ│ЄТќЎС┐ЮуЋЎтюе AWS жЏ▓уФ»ТѕќуЈЙта┤жЃеуй▓уњ░тбЃСИГсђѓ

WorkSpaces тЈ»У«ЊТѓеТа╣ТЊџ IP тю░тЮђсђЂућеТѕХуФ»УБЮуй«жАътъІТѕќжђЈжЂјСй┐ућеТЋИСйЇТєЉУГЅ№╝їу«АуљєтЊфС║ЏућеТѕХуФ»УБЮуй«тЈ»тГўтЈќТѓеуџё WorkSpacesсђѓ
ТѓетЈ»С╗Цу«Ауљєт░Ї iOSсђЂAndroidсђЂChrome СйюТЦГу│╗ух▒сђЂТЦху░АтъІжЏ╗УЁдтњї WorkSpaces Web Access ућеТѕХуФ»уџётГўтЈќсђѓ
т░ЇТќ╝ macOS тњї Microsoft Windows жЏ╗УЁд№╝їТѓетЈ»С╗ЦСй┐ућеТЋИСйЇТєЉУГЅжЎљтѕХтЃЁСЙЏС┐АС╗╗уџёУБЮуй«тГўтЈќ WorkSpacesсђѓ
ТѓетЈ»С╗ЦСй┐ућеС╗Ц IP тю░тЮђуѓ║тЪ║уцјуџёТјДтѕХуЙцухёт«џуЙЕУЃйтцатГўтЈќ WorkSpaces уџётЈ»С┐АС╗╗ IP тю░тЮђсђѓ

Amazon WorkSpaces УѕЄ AWS Key Management Service (KMS) ТЋ┤тљѕ№╝їТЈљСЙЏСй┐уће KMS т«бТѕХСИ╗жЄЉжЉ░ (CMK) тіат»є WorkSpaces тё▓тГўуБЂубЪтЇђуџётіЪУЃйсђѓ
ТѓеуЈЙтюетЈ»С╗ЦжЂИТЊЄтюетЋЪтІЋТќ░ WorkSpace ТЎѓтіат»єтё▓тГўуБЂубЪТЕЪ№╝їС╗Цуб║С┐Ютіат»єтѓ│У╝ИтњїжЮюТЁІУ│ЄТќЎС╗ЦтЈітЙъуБЂубЪтЇђт╗║уФІуџёт┐ФуЁДсђѓ

Active Directory тњї RADIUS ТЋ┤тљѕ:

Amazon WorkSpaces тЈ»У«ЊТѓеСй┐ућеуЈЙта┤жЃеуй▓ Microsoft Active Directory СЙєу«Ауљє WorkSpaces тЈіТюђухѓСй┐ућеУђЁуЎ╗тЁЦУ│ЄТќЎсђѓ
жђЈжЂјУѕЄуЈЙта┤жЃеуй▓ Active Directory уџёТЋ┤тљѕ№╝їСй┐ућеУђЁСЙ┐тЈ»Сй┐ућеУЄфти▒уЈЙТюЅуџёуЎ╗тЁЦУ│ЄТќЎуЎ╗тЁЦ№╝ї
УђїТѓетЈ»С╗Цт░ЄуЙцухётјЪтЅЄтЦЌућетѕ░ WorkSpacesсђЂСй┐ућеуЈЙТюЅтиЦтЁит░ЄУ╗ЪжФћжЃеуй▓тѕ░ WorkSpaces№╝їжѓётЈ»С╗ЦСй┐ућеуЈЙТюЅуџё RADIUS С╝║ТюЇтЎетЋЪуће Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)сђѓ
ТѓетЈ»С╗ЦжђЈжЂјтЁЕуе«Тќ╣т╝ЈУѕЄуЈЙта┤жЃеуй▓ Active Directory ТЋ┤тљѕ РђЊ т╗║уФІуЈЙта┤жЃеуй▓ Active Directory УѕЄ
AWS Directory Service for Microsoft Active Directory (Enterprise Edition) уХ▓тЪЪТјДтѕХуФЎС╣ІжќЊуџёт«ЅтЁеС┐АС╗╗жЌюС┐ѓ№╝ї
ТѕќСй┐уће AWS Directory Service Active Directory Connectorсђѓ

ТїЂС╣ЁТђДтё▓тГў:

Та╣ТЊџжЂИтЈќуџёТюЇтІЎтїЁ№╝їAmazon WorkSpaces У«ЊТ»ЈтђІСй┐ућеУђЁтЈ»С╗ЦтГўтЈќ AWS жЏ▓уФ»СИГСИЇтљїТЋИжЄЈуџёТїЂС╣ЁТђДтё▓тГў (SSD уБЂубЪтЇђ)сђѓ
Сй┐ућеУђЁтГўТћЙтюежЎёт▒гТќ╝тиЦСйюуЕ║жќЊуџёсђїСй┐ућеУђЁуБЂубЪтЇђсђЇСИГуџёУ│ЄТќЎт░Єт«џТюЪУЄфтІЋтѓЎС╗йУЄ│ Amazon S3сђѓAmazon S3 уџёУеГУеѕТў»уѓ║С║єт»дуЈЙ 99.999999999% уџёуЅЕС╗ХУђљС╣ЁТђД№╝їУ«ЊТѓеуџёСй┐ућеУђЁУ│ЄТќЎт«ЅтЁеуёАУЎъсђѓ

Amazon WorkSpaces Сй┐ућеУђЁС╣ЪтЈ»С╗ЦСй┐уће Amazon WorkDocs DriveсђѓСй┐ућеУђЁУЌЅућ▒Сй┐уће Amazon WorkDocs Drive№╝їт░▒тЈ»С╗ЦжђЈжЂјжђБуиџУЄ│тЁХ WorkSpace уџёТјЏУ╝ЅуБЂубЪТЕЪ№╝ї
СЙЮуЁДжюђТ▒ѓтГўтЈќтЁХтё▓тГўтюе Amazon WorkDocs СИіуџёТЅђТюЅтЁДт«╣сђѓСй┐ућеУђЁтЈ»С╗ЦСй┐уће Windows ТфћТАѕуИйу«А№╝їтѕЕућетЈ│жЇхтіЪУЃйУАетюе Web ућеТѕХуФ»СИГУцЄУБйтЈ»тЁ▒ућеуџёжђБухљсђЂжјќт«џсђЂУДБжЎцжјќт«џТѕќжќІтЋЪТфћТАѕсђѓ
Amazon WorkDocs Drive СИіуџёТЅђТюЅтЁДт«╣ТюЃУЄфтІЋжђЈжЂјтіат»єжђБуиџтљїТГЦУЄ│ Amazon WorkDocs№╝їС╗ЦСЙ┐СЙЏтЁХС╗ќУБЮуй«Сй┐ућесђѓтљїТГЦтѕ░ Amazon WorkDocs уџёУ│ЄТќЎтюеуД╗УйЅтњїжЮюТЁІТЎѓжЃйУЎЋТќ╝тіат»єуІђТЁІсђѓ

ТАїжЮбсђЂУАїтІЋтњї Web Access:

ТѓетЈ»жђЈжЂј Amazon WorkSpaces ућеТѕХуФ»ТЄЅућеуеІт╝ЈтЙъ Windows УѕЄ Mac жЏ╗УЁдсђЂChromebooksсђЂiPadsсђЂFire т╣│ТЮ┐жЏ╗УЁдС╗ЦтЈі Android т╣│ТЮ┐жЏ╗УЁдтГўтЈќ Amazon WorkSpacesсђѓ
Amazon WorkSpaces жѓёУЃйСй┐уће Chrome тњї Firefox Web уђЈУдйтЎежђ▓УАїтГўтЈќсђѓAmazon WorkSpaces Сйѕт╗║т«їТѕљС╣ІтЙї№╝їСй┐ућеУђЁТюЃТћХтѕ░СИђт░ЂжЏ╗тГљжЃхС╗Х№╝ї
тЁХСИГТЈљСЙЏСйЋУЎЋтЈ»СИІУ╝ЅТЅђжюђуџё Amazon WorkSpaces ућеТѕХуФ»ТЄЅућеуеІт╝ЈтњїтдѓСйЋжђБТјЦ Amazon WorkSpace уџёТїЄуц║сђѓ

жЂЕућеТќ╝ WindowsсђЂMac тњї Chromebooks уџё Amazon WorkSpaces ућеТѕХуФ»ТЄЅућеуеІт╝ЈтЈ»ТЈљСЙЏСй┐ућеУђЁжФўтЊЂУ│фуџё Windows ТАїжЮбжФћжЕЌсђѓ
жЂЕућеТќ╝ iPadсђЂFire т╣│ТЮ┐жЏ╗УЁдС╗ЦтЈі Android т╣│ТЮ┐жЏ╗УЁдуџё ућеТѕХуФ»ТЄЅућеуеІт╝Ј№╝їтЈ»уѓ║Сй┐ућеУђЁТЈљСЙЏти▓жЄЮт░Їт╣│ТЮ┐жЏ╗УЁдтёфтїќуџёТАїжЮбжФћжЕЌсђѓ
Сй┐ућеУђЁтЈ»С╗ЦСй┐ућетцџж╗ъУДИТјДТЅІтІбСЙєжА»уц║Тѕќжџ▒УЌЈУъбт╣ЋжЇхуЏцсђЂтГўтЈќС╗ЦУДИТјДТќ╣т╝ЈТЊЇСйюуџёТ╗Љж╝ауЋїжЮб№╝їжѓёТюЅТЇ▓тІЋтњїуИ«ТћЙсђѓућеТІЄТїЄтЙъУъбт╣ЋтидтЂ┤Т╗ЉтІЋтЈ»ТЅЊжќІТ╗ЉтЄ║т╝ЈТјДС╗ХУ╝фуЏц№╝ї
Сй┐ућеУђЁтЈ»С╗ЦтюежђЎУБАтГўтЈќтцџуе«тЉйС╗цсђѓтдѓТъюСй┐уће Fire Тѕќ Android т╣│ТЮ┐жЏ╗УЁд№╝їСй┐ућеУђЁтЈ»С╗ЦжђБТјЦжЇхуЏцТѕќУДИТјДТЮ┐№╝ї
тЙът╣│ТЮ┐жЏ╗УЁдуЇ▓тЙЌтњїуГєУеўтъІжЏ╗УЁдСИђТеБуџёСй┐ућежФћжЕЌсђѓСй┐уће Chrome Тѕќ Firefox тЈ»У«ЊСй┐ућеУђЁтюеС╗╗СйЋуХ▓Уи»СИіУ╝ЋжгєтГўтЈќ Amazon WorkSpaces№╝їуёАжаѕтЁѕСИІУ╝ЅућеТѕХуФ»ТЄЅућеуеІт╝Јсђѓ

entry.title: C#тѕцТќиEncoderТќиуиџVLCТњГТћЙтЎежЄЇжђБ
entry.content:
C#тѕцТќиEncoderТќиуиџVLCТњГТћЙтЎежЄЇжђБ

тЙъСИіу»ЄC#Сй┐ућеVlc64СйЇтЁЃТњГТћЙтЎеBy Vlc.DotNet:
https://davidchen0217.github.io/2019/12/23/C-Sharp%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8VLC64%E4%BD%8D%E5%85%83%E6%92%AD%E6%94%BE%E5%99%A8/
тЈ»С╗ЦСй┐ућеVLCТњГТћЙтЎеТњГТћЙRTSPсђЂRTMPРђдСИ▓ТхЂсђѓТюЃТюЅСИђуе«ТЃЁтбЃуЎ╝ућЪТў»Т║љжаГуџёEncoderжЄЇтЋЪжђаТѕљТњГТћЙСИГТџФтЂюсђѓ

entry.title: Cause Redisson Redis Exception And Interrupted Exception Reason
entry.content:
Cause Redisson Redis Exception And Interrupted Exception Reason

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣Cause Redisson Redis Exception And Interrupted Exception Reasonсђѓ

ExceptionтЁДт«╣

[2023/11/21 10:23:43.356][xxx.java:186][ERROR][ForkJoinPool-2-worker-1]
java.lang.InterruptedException
org.redisson.client.RedisException: java.lang.InterruptedException
at org.redisson.command.CommandAsyncService.get(CommandAsyncService.java:114)
~[redisson-3.23.2.jar:3.23.2]
Caused by: java.lang.InterruptedException
at java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture.reportGet(CompletableFuture.java:386)
~[?:?]
at java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture.get(CompletableFuture.java:2073)
~[?:?]
at org.redisson.command.CommandAsyncService.get(CommandAsyncService.java:110)
~[redisson-3.23.2.jar:3.23.2]
Рђд 14 more

уеІт╝Јуб╝уЅЄТ«х

new ForkJoinPool(1).execute(() -> {
try {
TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS.sleep(10000);
} catch (InterruptedException e) {
LogUtils.system.error(e.getMessage(), e);
}
SubscriberType.xxx.publish(РђюtestРђЮ);
});

С╗ЦСИіpublishТЎѓтИИТюЃтЄ║уЈЙжї»Уфц№╝їтЄ║уЈЙТЕЪујЄСИЇСИђт«џсђѓтјЪТюгС╗Цуѓ║Тў»Redisson Bug~
ТЪЦтѕ░ТюђтЙїТЅЇуЎ╝уЈЙnew ForkJoinPool(1)т»ФТ│ЋТюЅтЈ»УЃйтЪиУАїуињСИГТќиУђїУ«ЊтЪиУАїуињтЁДуџёуеІт╝Јуб╝уЅЄТ«хуЋ░тИИсђѓ

Тћ╣тќётЙїт»ФТ│Ћ

ForkJoinPool.commonPool().execute(() -> {
try {
TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS.sleep(10000);
} catch (InterruptedException e) {
LogUtils.system.error(e.getMessage(), e);
}
SubscriberType.xxx.publish(РђюtestРђЮ);
});

Сй┐ућеForkJoinPool.commonPool()уб║С┐ЮтЪиУАїуињтЁДС╗╗тІЎСИЇСИГТќи!

entry.title: CentOS7жЌюжќЅSELINUX
entry.content:
CentOS7жЌюжќЅSELINUX

тюе Linux жђ▓УАїУ╗ЪжФћт«ЅУБЮТЎѓ№╝їт╣ЙС╣јжЃйТюЃжЌюжќЅ SELinuxсђѓ
SELinux№╝ѕSecurity-Enhanced Linux№╝ЅТў»уѓ║С║єжЂ┐тЁЇСй┐ућеУђЁУ│ЄТ║љуџёУфцуће№╝їтюежђ▓УАїуеІт║ЈсђЂТфћТАѕуГЅу┤░жЃеТгіжЎљУеГт«џСЙЮТЊџуџёСИђтђІТаИт┐ЃТеАухё№╝Ђ
жЂхтЙъТюђт░ЈТгіжЎљуљєт┐х№╝їжаљУеГТЃЁТ│ЂСИІТЅђТюЅуеІт║ЈжЃйТў»УбФТІњухЋуџёсђѓ

SELinux тЁ▒ТюЅСИЅуе«ТеАт╝ЈтдѓСИІ№╝џ

Enforcing№╝џт╝итѕХТеАт╝Ј№╝їСЙЮТЊџУеГт«џСЙєжЎљтѕХТфћТАѕУ│ЄТ║љтГўтЈќсђѓ
Permissive№╝џт»гт«╣ТеАт╝Ј№╝їСИЇжЎљтѕХТфћТАѕУ│ЄТ║љтГўтЈќ№╝їСйєС╗ЇТюЃСЙЮТЊџУеГт«џТфбТЪЦСИдУеўжїёуЏИжЌюУеіТЂ»сђѓ
Disabled№╝џтЂюућеТеАт╝Ј№╝їSELinux ти▓УбФтЂюућесђѓ

Сй┐ућеТїЄС╗цтЈ»С╗ЦТЪЦУЕбуЏ«тЅЇТеАт╝Јсђѓ

Сй┐ућеТїЄС╗цтЈ»С╗ЦТфбУдќ SELinux УЕ│у┤░уІђТЁІсђѓ

жЄЮт░ЇSELINUXтЪиУАїТїЄС╗цтдѓСИІ:

reference:

entry.title: Create An AWS Account Step By Step
entry.content:
Create An AWS Account Step By Step

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣Create An AWS Account Step By Step.

Step By Step

Stage 1 - Sign up for an account

  1. Visit the Amazon Web Services home page.

  2. Choose Create an AWS Account.
    Note: If you signed in to AWS recently, choose Sign in to the Console.
    If Create a new AWS account isnРђЎt visible, first choose Sign in to a
    different account, and then choose Create a new AWS account.

  3. Enter your account information, and then choose Continue.
    Be sure that you enter your account information correctly, especially
    your email address. If you enter your email address incorrectly,
    you canРђЎt access your account.

  4. Choose Personal or Professional.
    Note: These two account types are identical in functionality.
    You can choose a personal account for your personal projects or choose
    professional for use within your company, an educational institution,
    or an organization.

  5. Enter your company or personal information.

  6. Read the AWS Customer Agreement, and then check the box.

  7. Click Create Account and Continue.

Stage 2 - Add a payment method

  1. On the Payment Information page, add a payment method by typing
    the requested information associated with your payment method.
  2. Choose Verify and Add.
    Important: You canРђЎt proceed with the sign-up process until you add a
    valid payment method.

Stage 3 - Verify your identity

  1. On the Identity Verification page. Choose your country or region
    code from the list.
  2. Enter a phone number where you can be reached in the next few minutes.
  3. Enter the code displayed in the CAPTCHA.
  4. When youРђЎre ready to receive a call or text message (sms). Choose
    Contact me/Send SMS. In a few moments you should be contacted via the
    verification system.
  5. Enter the verification code you receive and choose Verify Code.
  6. Choose Continue.

Stage 4 - Choose an AWS Support plan

  1. On the Select a Support Plan page, select the Basic Plan
    included in the free tier.
  2. Click Sign in to Console to sign in to your console.

Stage 5 - Set up free tier alert and custom billing alert

  1. Search for Billing in the search bar and select it.
  2. In the left hand navigation bar select Billing preferences
  3. Under the Cost Management Preferences section, select the check
    boxes for Receive Free Tier Usage Alerts and Receive Billing Alerts.
  4. Enter your email address into the text input box under Receive
    Free Tier Usage Alerts.
  5. Select Save preferences.
  6. In the services search bar, type in CloudWatch and select it.
  7. If necessary, change the Region in the upper right corner to
    US East (N. Virginia). Billing metric data is stored in this Region
    and represents worldwide charges.
  8. In the navigation pane, choose Alarms, then click Create Alarm.
  9. Choose Select metric. In the search bar under Metrics, type in
    Billing, then choose Billing >Total Estimated Charge. If you donРђЎt
    see Billing or the Total Estimated Charge metric, you may need to
    go back a few steps to enable billing alerts from the Billing
    preferences page.
  10. Select the check box next to EstimatedCharges, and choose
    Select metric.
  11. Under Conditions, choose Static.
  12. For Whenever EstimatedCharges is, choose Greater.
  13. For than, enter the monthly amount (this should be whatever
    number you are comfortable with. For example, 10) that must be
    exceeded to trigger the alarm. Choose Next.
  14. In the Notification box, for Alarm State Trigger, select In
    alarm. Under Select an SNS Topic, choose create a new topic to be
    notified.

Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) is a service that
publishes messages to a topic which delivers the message to all topic
subscribers.

  1. Enter a topic name. The name must be unique. Then, type
    in your email to receive the notification.
    NOTE: You will get an email in your inbox asking you to confirm your
    subscription to this topic. By confirming, youРђЎre ensuring that you
    will get notifications when your estimated billing charges rises
    above your threshold.Click Create Topic. Then, select Next.

  2. Enter in an alarm name and description. The name must contain
    only ASCII characters.

  3. Under Preview and create, confirm that the information and
    conditions are what you want, then choose Create alarm.

entry.title: Error Starting Userland Proxy Listen Tcp4 Bind Address Already In Use

entry.title: FilebeatDissect
entry.content:
Filebeat Dissect

1.One of the Processors used by Filebeat to cut logs
2.Dissect mainly cuts out the key through% {key_name}, and the corresponding content is
the value of this key
3.Tips for cutting the log: do not need to cut the text or special characters in the log, please
write it into the dissect processor

The following demonstrates a log dissect processor

Debugging procedure

Secondly, rewrite the path in test.yml to the pipeline yml path to be tested

Finally use command ./filebeat -c CustomConfig/test.yml to see debug message

Version control

Notice:

entry.title: Filebeat Pipeline
entry.content:
Filebeat Pipeline

Filebeat Pipeline т░ЄТюЃС╗Іу┤╣ Filebeat Pipeline ymlСИіуџёУеГт«џсђѓ

Yml Important reminder:

  1. Case sensitive
  2. Use indentation to represent hierarchical relationships
  3. Tabs are not allowed when indenting, only spaces are allowed.
  4. The number of indented spaces is not important,
    as long as elements of the same level are aligned to the left

Sample pipeline yml:

  • type: log
    paths:
  • Рђю${PWD}/sampleLogs/FullRecord.logРђЮ
    fields_under_root: true
    scan_frequency: 3s
    idle_timeout: 3s
    pipeline: fullrecordapi
    ignore_older: 2h
    close_inactive: 1h
    clean_inactive: 3h
    close_removed: true
    clean_removed: true
    processors:
  • dissect:
    tokenizer: Рђю[%{logdate}][%{class}][%{severity}][%{thread}]
    [Status]:%{Status},[Agent_ID]:%{Agent_ID},[Request]:%{Request},[Response]:%{Response}РђЮ

    field: РђюmessageРђЮ
    target_prefix: РђюРђЮ
  • drop_event:
    when:
    has_fields: [Рђюlog.flagsРђЮ]

Paths in pipeline yml:

If there are multiple paths in Paths, it is recommended to separate different yml for future
debugging and maintenance. The following is an example.

Multiple paths
$ vi fullrecordapi.yml

  • type: log
    paths:
  • /var/data/log/fullrecordapi/*.log
  • /var/data/log1/fullrecordapi/*.log
    fields_under_root: true
    scan_frequency: 3s
    idle_timeout: 3s
    pipeline: fullrecordapi

Separate yml:

$ vi fullrecordapi.yml

  • type: log
    paths:
  • /var/data/log/fullrecordapi/*.log
    fields_under_root: true
    scan_frequency: 3s
    idle_timeout: 3s
    pipeline: fullrecordapi
    $ vi fullrecordapi1.yml
  • type: log
    paths:
  • /var/data/log1/fullrecordapi/*.log
    fields_under_root: true
    scan_frequency: 3s
    idle_timeout: 3s
    pipeline: fullrecordapi

entry.title: Hexo NextT Upgrade
entry.content:
Hexo NextT Upgrade

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣How to upgrade Hexo & NextTсђѓ

Step By Step:

Version-
Hexo: 5.4.0
NextT: 8.7.0

1.жЄЇт╗║HexoУ│ЄТќЎтцЙ№╝їт«ЅУБЮТюђТќ░уЅѕТюгHexo
$ hexo init newMyblog
$ cd newMyblog
$ npm install
$ npm install hexo-deployer-git РђЊsave
$ npm install hexo-admin РђЊsave

2.Т»ћт░ЇТќ░УѕіHexo rootУ│ЄТќЎтцЙСИІуџё_config.yml
тЏаТќ░Уѕі_config.ymlжЂИжаЁтЁЕжѓіСИЇтљї№╝їжюђУдЂТ»ћт░Їт░ЄУѕіуџёУеГт«џуД╗ТцЇУЄ│Тќ░уџё_config.yml

3.т░ЄУѕіуџё /source/ СИІтЁежЃеУцЄУБйУЄ│Тќ░уџё /source/
ТГцТГЦжЕЪТў»уД╗ТцЇblogТќЄуФа

4.т«ЅУБЮТюђТќ░уЅѕNextTСИ╗жАї
$ cd newMyblog
$ git clone https://github.com/next-theme/hexo-theme-next themes/next

5.тЋЪућеrootУ│ЄТќЎтцЙСИІуџё_config.ymlуџёtheme:
theme: next

6.Т»ћт░ЇТќ░Уѕі /themes/next У│ЄТќЎтцЙСИІуџё_config.yml
СИђТеБућеТ»ћт░ЇуџёТќ╣т╝Јт░ЄУѕіуџёУеГт«џуД╗ТцЇтј╗Тќ░уџёУеГт«џ
memo: УеГт«џТюЅТќ░тбъсђЂУбФуД╗жЎцсђЂТѕќТЈЏСйЇуй«№╝їжюђжђљУАїТ»ћт░Ї

    $ hexo s

entry.content:
How To Clean All Docker Once

How To Clean All Docker Once

#!/bin/bash

#!/bin/bash уџёТёЈуЙЕ№╝џ

жђЎтюе Unix СИГуе▒уѓ║ shebangсђѓShebang Тў»ућ▒ТЋИтГЌугдУЎЪтњїТёЪтўєУЎЪухёТѕљуџётГЌугдТѕќтГЌТ»ЇуџёжЏєтљѕ№╝їтЇ│УЁ│ТюгжќІжаГуџё (#!)сђѓ
ТГБтдѓС╗Іу┤╣жЃетѕєТЅђУејУФќуџё№╝їshell уџёСИ╗УдЂтіЪУЃйТў»УДБжЄІућеТѕХухдтЄ║уџё UNIX тЉйС╗цсђѓUnix ућ▒Уе▒тцџ shell ухёТѕљ№╝ї
тЁХСИГ bash Тў»УбФт╗БТ│ЏСй┐ућеуџётЁХСИГС╣ІСИђсђѓт«ЃТў»тЪ║Тќ╝ Linux уџёТЊЇСйюу│╗ух▒тѕєжЁЇуџёж╗ўУфЇ shellсђѓ

СИђтђІУЁ│ТюгтїЁтљФт╣ЙтђІ UNIX тЉйС╗цсђѓуЈЙтюе№╝їтюеТ»ЈтђІУЁ│ТюгСИГ№╝їућеТѕХжЃйжюђУдЂТўјуб║ТїЄт«џС╗ќтђЉТЃ│УдЂућеСЙєжЂІУАїУЁ│Тюгуџё shell жАътъІсђѓ
уЈЙтюеУдЂТўјуб║ТїЄт«џУЁ│ТюгСй┐ућеуџё shell жАътъІ№╝їСй┐уће ShebangсђѓТЅђС╗ЦТѕЉтђЉтЈ»С╗ЦСй┐ућеshebang№╝ї
тЇ│УЁ│ТюгжќІжаГТѕќжаѓжЃеуџё#!/bin/bash СЙєТїЄуц║ТѕЉтђЉуџёу│╗ух▒Сй┐ућеbash Сйюуѓ║ж╗ўУфЇshellсђѓ

#!/bin/bash тњї #!/bin/sh С╣ІжќЊуџётЇђтѕЦ№╝џ
shebang, #!/bin/bash тюеУЁ│ТюгСИГСй┐ућеТЎѓућеТќ╝ТїЄуц║ТЊЇСйюу│╗ух▒Сй┐уће bash Сйюуѓ║тЉйС╗цУДБжЄІтЎесђѓ
Т»ЈтђІу│╗ух▒жЃйТюЅУЄфти▒уџё shell№╝їу│╗ух▒т░ЄСй┐ућежђЎС║Џ shell СЙєтЪиУАїУЄфти▒уџёу│╗ух▒УЁ│Тюгсђѓ
УЕ▓у│╗ух▒тцќТ«╝тЈ»УЃйтЏаТЊЇСйюу│╗ух▒УђїуЋ░№╝ѕтцДтцџТЋИТЃЁТ│ЂСИІт«Ѓт░ЄТў» bash№╝ЅсђѓуёХУђї№╝їуЋХ shebang ТЎѓ№╝ї
УЁ│ТюгСИГСй┐ућеуџё #!/bin/sh ТїЄуц║тЁДжЃеу│╗ух▒ shell жќІтДІУДБжЄІУЁ│Тюгсђѓ

СИІжЮбТў»СИђС║Џтюе shell УЁ│ТюгСИГућеТќ╝СИЇтљїуЏ«уџёуџё shebang№╝џ

Intro:

RLock lock = null;
try {
lock = LockDAO.getLock(event);
if (!lock.isLocked()) {
lock.lock(SystemConstant.REDIS_LOCK_EXPIRE_IN_MINUTES, TimeUnit.MINUTES);
System.out.println(i);
Thread.sleep(((long)(Math.random() * 1000)));
}
} catch (Exception e) {
System.out.println(e.toString());
} finally {
Optional.ofNullable(lock).filter(x -> x.isHeldByCurrentThread()).filter(x -> x.isLocked())
.ifPresent(x -> x.unlock());
}

уХЊТИгУЕдСй┐уће

.ifPresent(x -> x.unlock());

entry.title: HttpSessionтјЪуљє
entry.content:
HttpSessionтјЪуљє

у░АС╗І:
уЋХтўЌУЕдтЪиУАї HttpServletRequest уџё getSession() ТЎѓ№╝їWebт«╣тЎеТюЃуѓ║Сйат╗║уФІ HttpSession уЅЕС╗Х№╝ї
Т»ЈтђІ HttpSession уЅЕС╗ХжЃйТюЃТюЅтђІуЅ╣Т«іуџё ID№╝їуе▒С╣Іуѓ║Session ID№╝їСйатЈ»С╗ЦтЪиУАї HttpSession уџё getId()
СЙєтЈќтЙЌ Session IDсђѓжђЎтђІ Session ID жаљУеГТюЃСй┐уће Cookie тГўТћЙУЄ│уђЈУдйтЎе№╝ї
Cookie уџётљЇуе▒жаљУеГТў» JSESSIONID№╝їТЋИтђ╝тЅЄТў» getId() тЈќтЙЌуџё Session IDсђѓ

HttpSession Roadmap:

1.HttpSessionт▒гТђДТў»тГўтюеServer
2.Session ID жаљУеГСй┐уће Cookie тГўТћЙТќ╝уђЈУдйтЎе
3.Web т«╣тЎетё▓тГў Session ID уџё Cookie жаљУеГуѓ║жЌюжќЅуђЈУдйтЎет░▒тц▒ТЋѕ
4.жЄЇТќ░жќІтЋЪуђЈУдйтЎеУФІТ▒ѓТЄЅућеуеІт╝ЈТЎѓ№╝їжђЈжЂј getSession() тЈќтЙЌуџёт░▒Тў»Тќ░уџё HttpSession уЅЕС╗Х
5.HttpSession уЅЕС╗ХТюЃСйћућеУеўТєХжФћуЕ║жќЊ№╝їТЅђС╗Ц HttpSession уџёт▒гТђДСИГтёўжЄЈСИЇУдЂтё▓тГўУђЌУ│ЄТ║љуџётцДтъІуЅЕС╗Х№╝їт┐ЁУдЂТЎѓт░Єт▒гТђДуД╗жЎц
6.ТѕќУђЁСИЇжюђСй┐уће HttpSession ТЎѓ№╝їтЪиУАї invalidate() У«Њ HttpSession тц▒ТЋѕ
7.жаљУеГжЌюжќЅуђЈУдйтЎеТюЃждгСИітц▒ТЋѕуџёТў»уђЈУдйтЎеСИіуџё Cookie№╝їСИЇТў»С╝║ТюЇтЎеСИіуџё HttpSession уЅЕС╗Х
8.тЏауѓ║ Cookie тц▒ТЋѕС║є№╝їт░▒уёАТ│ЋжђЈжЂј Cookie СЙєуЎ╝жђЂ Session ID№╝їТЅђС╗ЦтўЌУЕд getSession() ТЎѓ№╝їт«╣тЎеТюЃућбућЪТќ░уџё HttpSession
9.У«Њ HttpSession уФІтЇ│тц▒ТЋѕт┐ЁжаѕтЪиУАї invalidate() Тќ╣Т│Ћ№╝їтљдтЅЄуџёУЕ▒№╝їHttpSession ТюЃуГЅтѕ░УеГт«џуџётц▒ТЋѕТюЪжќЊжЂјтЙїТЅЇТюЃУбФт«╣тЎежіиТ»ђтЏъТћХ

web.xml session timeout

HttpSession.setMaxInactiveInterval:

тЪиУАї HttpSession уџё setMaxInactiveInterval() Тќ╣Т│Ћ№╝їТЅђУеГт«џуџёТў» HttpSession уЅЕС╗ХтюеуђЈУдйтЎетцџС╣ЁТ▓њТ┤╗тІЋт░▒тц▒ТЋѕуџёТЎѓжќЊ
УђїСИЇТў»тё▓тГў Session ID уџё Cookie тц▒ТЋѕТЎѓжќЊсђѓтё▓тГў Session ID уџё Cookie жаљУеГуѓ║жЌюжќЅуђЈУдйтЎет░▒тц▒ТЋѕ
тюе Servlet 4.0 СИГ№╝їHttpSession жаљУеГтц▒ТЋѕТЎѓжќЊ№╝їС╣ЪтЈ»С╗ЦжђЈжЂј ServletContext уџё setSessionTimeout() СЙєУеГт«џсђѓ
жђЈжЂј SessionCookieConfig т»дСйюуЅЕС╗Х№╝їСйатЈ»С╗ЦУеГт«џтё▓тГў Session ID уџё Cookie уЏИжЌюУ│ЄУеі№╝їСЙІтдѓтЈ»С╗ЦжђЈжЂј setName() т░ЄжаљУеГуџё Session ID тљЇуе▒С┐«Тћ╣уѓ║тѕЦуџётљЇуе▒
жђЈжЂј setMaxAge() УеГт«џтё▓тГў Session ID уџё Cookie тГўТ┤╗ТюЪжЎљ (тќ«СйЇ:уДњ)
УдЂТ│еТёЈуџёТў»№╝їУеГт«џ SessionCookieConfig т┐Ёжаѕтюе ServletContext УбФтѕЮтДІтїќС╣ІтЅЇ

web.xml С┐«Тћ╣ Session IDсђЂCookie тГўТ┤╗ТюЪуГЅУ│ЄУеі:

entry.title: Install Kubernetes Step By Step
entry.content:
Install Kubernetes Step By Step

Install Kubernetes Step By Step

Install Kubernetes Step By Step

1.уб║УфЇуХ▓Уи»жђБуиџТў»тљдТГБтИИ
cat /etc/hosts
ping node1 -c3
ping node2 -c3
ping google.com -c3
2.т«ЅУБЮdocker
yum install sshpass -y

yum install docker -y
sshpass -p container ssh -p 22 root@node1 Рђюyum install docker -yРђЮ
sshpass -p container ssh -p 22 root@node2 Рђюyum install docker -yРђЮ
3.тЋЪтІЋТюЇтІЎ
systemctl enable docker && systemctl start docker && systemctl status docker
sshpass -p container ssh -p 22 root@node1 Рђюsystemctl enable docker && systemctl start docker && systemctl status dockerРђЮ
sshpass -p container ssh -p 22 root@node2 Рђюsystemctl enable docker && systemctl start docker && systemctl status dockerРђЮ
7.т«ЅУБЮТїЄС╗цУБютЁХтіЪУЃй
yum install bash-completion -y
sshpass -p container ssh -p 22 root@node1 Рђюyum install bash-completion -yРђЮ
sshpass -p container ssh -p 22 root@node2 Рђюyum install bash-completion -yРђЮ
8.тЂюућеswap
swapoff /dev/mapper/centos-swap
sed -i Рђўs/^/dev/mapper/centos-swap/#&/gРђЎ /etc/fstab
sshpass -p container ssh -p 22 root@node1 Рђюswapoff /dev/mapper/centos-swapРђЮ
sshpass -p container ssh -p 22 root@node1 Рђюsed -i Рђўs/^/dev/mapper/centos-swap/#&/gРђЎ /etc/fstabРђЮ
sshpass -p container ssh -p 22 root@node2 Рђюswapoff /dev/mapper/centos-swapРђЮ
sshpass -p container ssh -p 22 root@node2 Рђюsed -i Рђўs/^/dev/mapper/centos-swap/#&/gРђЎ /etc/fstabРђЮ
9.УеГт«џsysctlтЈЃТЋИ
$ vi /etc/sysctl.d/k8s.conf

entry.title: Intro Csharp RS232
entry.content:
Intro Csharp RS232

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣жђЈжЂјRS232 Protocolт░ЇdeviceтЂџwriteтњїreadТЊЇСйюсђѓ

тѕЮтДІRS232жђБуиџ:

SerialPort serialPort = new SerialPort();
public bool Init(int _comPort, BaudRateType baudRateType, ScanType scanType)
{
comPort = _comPort;
try
{
var comportName = string.Format(@РђЮCOM{0}РђЮ, comPort);
if (serialPort != null && serialPort.IsOpen)
{
serialPort.Close();
}
serialPort = new SerialPort
{
PortName = comportName
};
switch (baudRateType)
{
case BaudRateType.BaudRate9600:
serialPort.BaudRate = 9600;
break;
case BaudRateType.BaudRate19200:
serialPort.BaudRate = 19200;
break;
case BaudRateType.BaudRate38400:
serialPort.BaudRate = 38400;
break;
case BaudRateType.BaudRate57600:
serialPort.BaudRate = 57600;
break;
case BaudRateType.BaudRate115200:
serialPort.BaudRate = 115200;
break;
default:
serialPort.BaudRate = 19200;
break;
}
serialPort.Parity = Parity.None;
serialPort.DataBits = 8;
serialPort.StopBits = StopBits.One;
serialPort.ReadBufferSize = 1024;
serialPort.WriteBufferSize = 1024;

    if (serialPort != null && !serialPort.IsOpen)
    {
        try
        {
            serialPort.Open();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            if (!MachineDataObj.IsTestAutoMode)
            {
                LogUtil.logger.Error(Convert.ToString(ex));
            }
            serialPort = null;
            return false;
        }
    }

    this.scanType = scanType;
    openCom = 1;
}
catch (Exception ex)
{
    TelegramBotType.FatalAndCallTelegram(Convert.ToString(ex));
}
return true;

}

Form_Load тѕЮтДІУеГт«џ:

serialPort.DataReceived += new SerialDataReceivedEventHandler(dataReceived);
//defaultТў»false№╝їжюђТИгУЕджЂјТЅЇУЃйСй┐уће
serialPort.DtrEnable = true;
//defaultТў»false№╝їжюђТИгУЕджЂјТЅЇУЃйСй┐уће
serialPort.RtsEnable = true;
serialPort.ReadTimeout = 1000;

Read Data via RS232 Protocol:

private void dataReceived(object sender, SerialDataReceivedEventArgs e)
{
if (serialPort.IsOpen)
{
DateTime dateTimeNow = DateTime.Now;
//dateTimeNow.GetDateTimeFormats();
textBoxReceive.Text += string.Format(Рђю{0}\r\nРђЮ, dateTimeNow);
//dateTimeNow.GetDateTimeFormats(РђўfРђЎ)[0].ToString() + Рђю\r\nРђЮ;
textBoxReceive.ForeColor = Color.Red;

    //ASCII
    if (radioButtonReceiveDataASCII.Checked == true) 
    {
        try
        {
            String input = serialPort.ReadLine();
            textBoxReceive.Text += input + "\r\n";
            // save data to file
            if (saveDataFS != null)
            {
                byte[] info = new UTF8Encoding(true).GetBytes(input + "\r\n");
                saveDataFS.Write(info, 0, info.Length);
            }
        }
        catch(System.Exception ex)
        {
            MessageBox.Show(ex.Message);
            return;
        }
        
        textBoxReceive.SelectionStart = textBoxReceive.Text.Length;
        textBoxReceive.ScrollToCaret();
        serialPort.DiscardInBuffer(); 
    }
    else //HEX
    {
        try
        {

            string input = serialPort.ReadLine();
            char[] values = input.ToCharArray();
            foreach (char letter in values)
            {
                // Get the integral value of the character.
                int value = Convert.ToInt32(letter);
                // Convert the decimal value to a hexadecimal value in string form.
                string hexOutput = String.Format("{0:X}", value);
                textBoxReceive.AppendText(hexOutput + " ");
                textBoxReceive.SelectionStart = textBoxReceive.Text.Length;
                textBoxReceive.ScrollToCaret();
                //textBoxReceive.Text += hexOutput + " ";

            }

            // save data to file
            if (saveDataFS != null)
            {
                byte[] info = new UTF8Encoding(true).GetBytes(input + "\r\n");
                saveDataFS.Write(info, 0, info.Length);
            }


        }
        catch(System.Exception ex)
        {
            MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "Error");
            textBoxReceive.Text = "";
        }
    }
}
else
{
    MessageBox.Show("Com error");
}

}

Write Data via RS232 Protocol:

private void buttonSendData_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
{
if (!serialPort.IsOpen)
{
MessageBox.Show(РђюOpen comPortРђЮ);
return;
}

String strSend = textBoxSend.Text;
if (radioButtonSendDataASCII.Checked == true) //Send ASCII
{
    serialPort.WriteLine(strSend);//тЈЉжђЂСИђУАїТЋ░ТЇ« 

}
else
{
    //Send 16жђ▓тѕХућеHEX
     
    char[] values = strSend.ToCharArray();
    foreach (char letter in values)
    {
        // Get the integral value of the character.
        int value = Convert.ToInt32(letter);
        // Convert the decimal value to a hexadecimal value in string form.
        string hexIutput = String.Format("{0:X}", value);
        serialPort.WriteLine(hexIutput);

    }
}

}

entry.title: Intro Docker Basic Instructions
entry.content:
Intro Docker Basic Instructions

Intro Docker Basic Instructions

Docker Basic Instructions

docker search
$ docker search mysql

docker pull
$ docker pull mysql
/var/lib/docker

СИЇТїЄт«џуЅѕТюг№╝їжаљУеГТў»latest
$ docker pull mysql

entry.content:

жђЎу»Єу░АС╗ІJsonView & How to use№╝їтЏауѓ║У│ЄТќЎТѕќтіЪУЃйТеАухёт«џуЙЕ№╝ї
жЄЮт░ЇтљїТеБуџёжаЁуЏ«(table/item)тЁЂУе▒ТѕќжюђУдЂТЊЇСйюуџёТгёСйЇ(column/attribute)ТюЅТЅђСИЇтљїсђѓ
тЈ»С╗ЦућеJsonViewСЙєт«џуЙЕжюђУдЂућбтЄ║уџёТгёСйЇсђѓ

Example:

public class TestJsonView {

public interface TestView {
}

private String userName;

private String passWord;

@JsonView({TestView.class})
public String getUserName() {
return userName;
}

public String getPassWord() {
return passWord;
}

}

String jsonString = JSONUtils.toJsonString(TestJsonViewObj, TestJsonView.TestView.class);

Output: {РђюuserNameРђЮ : РђюxxxРђЮ}

тЈфтѕЌтЄ║userName№╝їСИЇТюЃтѕЌтЄ║passWord

entry.title: Intro Kibana Query Language For UpdateByQuery And DeleteByQuery
entry.content:
Intro Kibana Query Language For UpdateByQuery And DeleteByQuery

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣жђЈжЂјKibana Query Language тЂџ UpdateByQuery Or DeleteByQuery Recordсђѓ

UpdateByQuery Example:

POST table*/_update_by_query
{
Рђюtrack_total_hitsРђЮ:true,
РђюqueryРђЮ: {
РђюboolРђЮ: {
РђюfilterРђЮ: [
{
РђюrangeРђЮ: {
РђюStartTimeРђЮ: {
РђюfromРђЮ: Рђю2020/12/11 00:00:00.000РђЮ,
РђюtoРђЮ: Рђю2020/12/11 23:59:00.000РђЮ,
Рђюinclude_upperРђЮ: true,
Рђюinclude_lowerРђЮ: true,
РђюformatРђЮ: Рђюyyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss.SSSРђЮ
}
}
}
],
РђюshouldРђЮ: [
{
РђюtermРђЮ: {
РђюstatusРђЮ: {
РђюvalueРђЮ: 1
}
}
}
],
Рђюminimum_should_matchРђЮ: 1
}
},
РђюscriptРђЮ: {
РђюsourceРђЮ: Рђюctx._source.status=2РђЮ,
РђюlangРђЮ: РђюpainlessРђЮ
}
}

memo:
т░ЄStartTimeугдтљѕ2020/12/11 00:00:00.000 ~ 2020/12/11 23:59:00.000ТЎѓжќЊтЇђжќЊтЁД СИћ status = 1уџёУ│ЄТќЎ
Тћ╣Тѕљstatus = 2

DeleteByQuery Example:

POST table*/_delete_by_query?scroll_size=5000
{
РђюqueryРђЮ: {
РђюtermРђЮ: {
РђюkeyРђЮ: РђюvalueРђЮ
}
}
}

entry.title: Intro Linux $ vmstat
entry.content:
Intro Linux $ vmstat

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣Linux $ vmstatТїЄС╗цсђѓ

ућежђћ

ТЪЦуюІCPU usageсђЂmemory usageсђЂIO read/writeсђѓ

тюеLinuxУ╝ИтЁЦ
$ vmstat

Output:
procs РђћРђћРђћРђЊmemoryРђћРђћРђћ- РђћswapРђЊ РђћРђЊioРђћ- -systemРђЊ РђћРђћcpuРђћРђЊ
r b swpd free buff cache si so bi bo in cs us sy id wa st
0 0 0 11560580 12 266248 0 0 4 3 95 161 1 0 99 0 0

тЈЃТЋИУффТўј

proc:
r: QueueСИГуџёprocessтђІТЋИ
b: уГЅтЙЁСИГуџёprocessтђІТЋИ

memory:
swpd: УЎЏТЊгУеўТєХжФћТЅђтЇаућеуџёуЕ║жќЊ
free: тЈ»ућеуџёУеўТєХжФћуЕ║жќЊ
buff: BufferТЅђтЇаућеуџёУеўТєХжФћуЕ║жќЊ
cache: CacheТЅђтЇаућеуџёУеўТєХжФћуЕ║жќЊ

swap:
si: Swap-in (тЙъdiskт»ФтЁЦУеўТєХжФћуџётцДт░Ј)
so: Swap-out (тЙъУеўТєХжФћт»Фтѕ░diskуџётцДт░Ј)

io:
bi: I/O Т»ЈуДњУ«ђтЈќуџёblockтђІТЋИ
bo: I/O Т»ЈуДњт»ФтЁЦуџёblockтђІТЋИ

system:
in: Т»ЈуДњСИГТќиуџётђІТЋИ
cs: Т»ЈуДњcontext switchуџётђІТЋИсђѓ
Context switchТёЈТїЄprocessтюетцџтиЦуџёуњ░тбЃТѕќТў»жЂЄтѕ░СИГТќиуџёТЃЁтйбСИІжђ▓УАїуІђТЁІтѕЄТЈЏуџётІЋСйюсђѓ

cpu
us: Сй┐ућеУђЁтЪиУАїуџёТЎѓжќЊ (user time)
sy: KernelтЪиУАїуџёТЎѓжќЊ (system time)
id: IdleуГЅтЙЁуџёТЎѓжќЊ
wa: уГЅтЙЁI/OуџёТЎѓжќЊ
st: тцџтиЦуњ░тбЃСИГ№╝їТЎѓжќЊуФітЈќ(time stolen)уџёТЎѓжќЊсђѓ

entry.title: Intro Nginx Location Rewrite Setting
entry.content:
Intro Nginx Location Rewrite Setting

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣Nginx Location Rewrite Setting.

How to set redirect?

From http://192.168.1.1/aaa/123 To http://172.1.0.1/123

Nginx Setting:
location /aaa/123/ {
rewrite /aaa/(.*) /$1 break;
proxy_pass http://192.168.1.1;
proxy_set_header Host $host;
proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
}

entry.title: Intro OKHttp Parameter CallTimeOut
entry.content:
Intro OKHttp Parameter CallTimeOut

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣OKHttp Parameter CallTimeOut.

т«ўТќ╣УффТўј:

Sets the default timeout for complete calls.

A value of 0 means no timeout, otherwise values must be

between 1 and Integer.MAX_VALUE when converted to milliseconds.

The call timeout spans the entire call: resolving DNS, connecting,

writing the request body, server processing, and reading the response body.

If the call requires redirects or retries all must complete within one timeout period.

The default value is 0 which imposes no timeout.

Сй┐ућеТЃЁтбЃ & УДБТ▒║Тќ╣Т│Ћ:

entry.title: Intro Redis Based Tomcat Session Manager
entry.content:
Intro Redis Based Tomcat Session Manager

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣Redis Based Tomcat Session Managerсђѓ

жЁЇуй«Тќ╣Т│ЋтЈіС╗Іу┤╣УеГт«џтЈЃТЋИ

тюе/conf/context.xml тіатЁЦ

УеГт«џтЈЃТЋИтдѓСИІ:
keyPrefix - string prefix applied to all Redis keys.
Allows to connect different Tomcat environments to the same Redis instance.

readMode - read Session attributes mode. Two modes are available:

MEMORY - stores attributes into local Tomcat Session and Redis. 
Further Session updates propagated to local Tomcat Session using Redis-based events.

REDIS - stores attributes into Redis only. Default mode.

broadcastSessionEvents - if true then sessionCreated and sessionDestroyed events are broadcasted
across all Tomcat instances and cause all registered HttpSessionListeners to be triggered. Default is false.

broadcastSessionUpdates - if true and readMode=MEMORY then session updates are broadcasted across
all Tomcat instances. Default is true.

updateMode - Session attributes update mode. Two modes are available:

DEFAULT - session attributes are stored into Redis only through the Session.setAttribute method. Default mode.

AFTER_REQUEST
In readMode=REDIS all changes of session attributes made through the Session.setAttribute method are
accumulated in memory and stored into Redis only after the end of the request.
In readMode=MEMORY all session attributes are always stored into Redis after the end of the request
regardless of the Session.setAttribute method invocation. It is useful in case when some objects stored
in session change their own state without Session.setAttribute method execution. Updated attributes are
removed from all other Session instances if broadcastSessionUpdates=true and reloaded from Redis
when these attributes are requested.

configPath - path to Redisson YAML config. See configuration wiki page for more details.

тіатЁЦjarУЄ│TOMCAT_BASE/libуЏ«жїёСИІ
redisson-all-3.24.3.jar
Tomcat 10.x - redisson-tomcat-10-3.24.3.jar

entry.title: Intro Request Detailed Data With User Agent Client Hints
entry.content:
Intro Request Detailed Data With User Agent Client Hints

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣Request Detailed Data With User Agent Client Hintsсђѓ

User Agent Client Hints:

у╣╝СИіСИђу»ЄChrome110жќІтДІТЈљСЙЏтЏ║т«џуџёGAтЁДт«╣№╝їСйєт»дтІЎСИіСй┐ућеТюЃжюђУдЂУЕ│у┤░уџёУ│ЄУеіСЙєТЄЅућетюетљёуе«ућбтЊЂТѕќтѕєТъљСИісђѓ
ТЋЁтЈ»С╗ЦСй┐ућеUser-Agent Client Hints (UA-CH) APIжђЈжЂјHTTP headers Тѕќ JavaScriptСЙєтЈќтЙЌУ│ЄТќЎсђѓ

You may have already seen the default headers being sent with the Sec-CH-UA- prefix that tells you the browser,
its major version, the operating system, and if the browser is a mobile device.

Default User-Agent Client Hints request headers from Chrome:

Sec-CH-UA: РђюChromiumРђЮ;v=РђЮ110РђЮ, РђюNot A(BrandРђЮ;v=РђЮ24РђЮ, РђюGoogle ChromeРђЮ;v=РђЮ110РђЮ
Sec-CH-UA-Mobile: ?1
Sec-CH-UA-Platform: РђюAndroidРђЮ

You can use the Accept-CH header in your response to ask for more data. In this case, you can ask for
Sec-CH-UA-Platform-Version and Sec-CH-UA-Model to get that Android version and device type back in subsequent requests.

Response header from your server specifying platform version and model:

Accept-CH:
Sec-CH-UA-Platform-Version,
Sec-CH-UA-Model

Request headers back from Chrome including Android version and model name:

Sec-CH-UA-Platform-Version: Рђю13.0.0РђЮ
Sec-CH-UA-Model: РђюPixel 7РђЮ

You can do the same thing in JavaScript by calling getHighEntropyValues() on the userAgentData API, passing in an array
of the values you want: platformVersion and model. This returns a promise with an object containing the specific values.

navigator.userAgentData
.getHighEntropyValues(
[РђўplatformVersionРђЎ, РђўmodelРђЎ]
).then(ua => { console.log(ua)
});

{
РђюplatformVersionРђЮ: Рђю13.0.0РђЮ,
РђюmodelРђЮ: РђюPixel 7РђЮ
}

entry.title: JavaJDBC-timeout
entry.content:
JavaJDBC-timeout

тюеOracle JDBCтЪиУАїSQLТюЅт╣ЙтђІУеГт«џtimeoutуџёТќ╣Т│Ћ№╝їТЈљСЙЏтЈЃУђЃсђѓ

Connection pool:

import org.apache.tomcat.jdbc.pool.DataSource;

DataSource datasource = new DataSource();
// Тў»тљдТфбТЪЦтђЪтЄ║ТюфТГИжѓёуџёжђБуиџ
datasource.setRemoveAbandoned(true);
// тђЪтЄ║ТюфТГИжѓёуџёжђБуиџтѕ░тцџС╣ЁуџёТЎѓтђЎСИГТќи
datasource.setRemoveAbandonedTimeout(120);
// тцџС╣ЁТфбТЪЦСИђТгАтђЪтЄ║ТюфТГИжѓёуџёжђБуиџ№╝їТЅђС╗ЦжђЎтђІТАѕСЙІТюђу│ЪуІђТ│ЂтЈ»УЃйТў»(120+60)уДњ
datasource.setTimeBetweenEvictionRunsMillis(60 * 1000);

  1. уЋХуеІт╝ЈтЙъpoolУдЂТ▒ѓconnectionТЎѓжќІтДІУеѕу«Ќ№╝їУХЁжЂјуДњТЋИТЎѓ№╝їpoolТюЃт╝итѕХСИГТќижђБуиџ№╝їСИдтЙъpoolуД╗жЎц№╝ї
    уГЅжџетЙїт░ЇconnтЂџТЊЇСйюТЎѓ№╝їТюЃТІІтЄ║java.sql.SQLException: Connection has already been closedуџёСЙІтцќ
  2. жЂ┐тЁЇуЋХуеІт╝Јт┐ўУеўжЌюconnectionТЎѓ№╝їУ│ЄТ║љтЈ»С╗ЦУбФжЄІТћЙ
  3. жЂ┐тЁЇуЋХDBжђБуиџуЋ░тИИТЎѓ№╝їconnectionТїЂу║їУбФжјќСйЈ
  4. тЏауѓ║Тў»т╝итѕХСИГТќи№╝їТЅђС╗ЦуёАТ│ЋrollbackУиЪcommit№╝їтЪиУАїухљТъютЈ»УЃйСИЇтдѓжаљТюЪ

getWriteConnection(int timeout):

УЌЅућ▒timeoutжђЎтђІтЈЃТЋИтЈ»С╗ЦУдєт»ФжаљУеГтюеconnection poolтЁДуџёabandonedTimeoutТЎѓжќЊ№╝ї
УЌЅТГц№╝їуЋХТѕЉтђЉтюетЪиУАїСИђС║ЏжюђУдЂтцДжЄЈТЎѓжќЊуџётЄйТЋИТЎѓ№╝їтЈ»С╗ЦжЂ┐тЁЇжђБуиџУбФconnection poolСИГТќи

тюеPreparedStatementУБАжЮбТюЅСИђтђІsetQueryTimeoutтЄйТЋИ№╝їУЌЅТГцтЈ»С╗ЦТїЄт«џтЪиУАїуџёТЎѓжќЊ

  1. тЪиУАїУХЁжЂјТїЄт«џТЎѓжќЊ№╝їТюЃТІІтЄ║SQLTimeoutExceptionСЙІтцќ№╝їСйєconnectionСИЇТюЃУбФжЌюжќЅ№╝їС╣ЪСИЇТюЃтЙъpoolуД╗жЎц
  2. т░ЇТЎѓжќЊТ»ћУ╝ЃТЋЈТёЪуџёТЪЦУЕбуеІт╝Ј№╝їСЙІтдѓcacheуџёТЏ┤Тќ░№╝їтЈ»С╗ЦУеГт«џСИђтђІтЪиУАїТЎѓжќЊ№╝їУХЁжЂјжаљТюЪТЎѓ№╝їтЈ»С╗ЦТЪЦТЅЙтЈдСИђтђІnode

entry.title: JavaScript-ES6-function
entry.content:
JavaScript-ES6-function

жђЎу»Єу░АС╗ІJavaScript-ES6-functionсђѓ

default parameter part I:

ES6 allow default parameter:

function log(x, y = РђўWorldРђЎ) {
console.log(x, y);
}

log(РђўHelloРђЎ) // Hello World
log(РђўHelloРђЎ, РђўChinaРђЎ) // Hello China
log(РђўHelloРђЎ, РђўРђЎ) // Hello

function Point(x = 0, y = 0) {
this.x = x;
this.y = y;
}

const p = new Point();
p // { x: 0, y: 0 }

default parameter part II:

default parameter Cannot redeclare let or const:
function foo(x = 5) {
let x = 1; // error
const x = 2; // error
}

default parameter
function Cannot have same parameter name:
// non-error
function foo(x, x, y) {
// Рђд
}

// error
function foo(x, x, y = 1) {
// Рђд
}
// SyntaxError: Duplicate parameter name not allowed in this context

Т»ЈТгАтЉ╝тЈФfunctionТЎѓ№╝їdefault parameterжЃйТюЃжЄЇТќ░Уеѕу«Ќ x + 1№╝їСИЇТюЃСй┐ућеСИіСИђТгАуџёdefault parameter

let x = 99;
function foo(p = x + 1) {
console.log(p);
}

foo() // 100

x = 100;
foo() // 101

default parameter combine ObjectDestructuration:

function foo({x, y = 5}) {
console.log(x, y);
}

foo({}) // undefined 5
foo({x: 1}) // 1 5
foo({x: 1, y: 2}) // 1 2
foo() // TypeError: Cannot read property РђўxРђЎ of undefined

entry.title: JavaScript-ES6-variable 2nd
entry.content:
JavaScript-ES6-variable 2nd

жђЎу»Єу░АС╗ІJavaScript-ES6 variable destructuration defaultсђѓ

variable destructuration default
destructuration allow default value:

let [foo = true] = [];
foo // true

let [x, y = РђўbРђЎ] = [РђўaРђЎ]; // x=РђЎaРђЎ, y=РђЎbРђЎ
let [x, y = РђўbРђЎ] = [РђўaРђЎ, undefined]; // x=РђЎaРђЎ, y=РђЎbРђЎ

ES6тЁДжЃеСй┐уће === СЙєтѕцТќитђ╝№╝їуЋХarrayтЁД === undefinedТЎѓТЅЇТюЃСй┐default valueућЪТЋѕ

let [x = 1] = [undefined];
x // 1

уЋХassign nullТЎѓ№╝їтЏа !=== undefined№╝їdefault valueСИЇућЪТЋѕ

let [x = 1] = [null];
x // null

жђЎтђІСЙІтГљтЏаxТюЅdefault value№╝їТЅђС╗Цf()СИЇТюЃтЪиУАї

function f() {
console.log(РђўaaaРђЎ);
}

let [x = f()] = [1];

СИіСЙІуГЅТќ╝СИІТќ╣code

let x;
if ([1][0] === undefined) {
x = f();
} else {
x = [1][0];
}

default valueтЈ»С╗Цт╝Ћућеvariable№╝їСйєУЕ▓variableт┐Ёжаѕти▓assign value:

let [x = 1, y = x] = []; // x=1; y=1
let [x = 1, y = x] = [2]; // x=2; y=2
let [x = 1, y = x] = [1, 2]; // x=1; y=2
let [x = y, y = 1] = []; // ReferenceError: y is not defined -> variable y жѓёТ▓њassign value т░▒ухд x уЋХ default value

entry.title: JavaScript-WebSocket
entry.content:
JavaScript-WebSocket

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣JavaScript-WebSocketсђѓ

Example:

/* global postAjax /
/ global ObjectUtil /
/ global $j */
// eslint-disable-next-line no-var

var MobileWebSocket = (function mobileWebSocket() {
let webSocket = null;
let count = 0;

const createWebSocket = () => {
    if (ObjectUtil.isObject(webSocket)) {
        return;
    }
    postAjax({
        url: "API Path",
        data: {
        },
        success(response) {
            if (response.status === "200") {
                if ("WebSocket" in window) {
                    let tempWS = null;
                    if (window.location.protocol === "https:") {
                        tempWS = new WebSocket("wss://" + window.location.hostname + response.path + "?token=" + response.token);
                    } else {
                        tempWS = new WebSocket("ws://" + window.location.hostname + ":" + window.location.port + response.path + "?token=" + response.token);
                    }
                    tempWS.onerror = () => {
                        console.warn("WebSocket error");
                        if (ObjectUtil.isObject(webSocket)) {
                            webSocket.close();
                        }
                        webSocket = null;
                    };

                    tempWS.onopen = () => {
                        heartCheck.start();
                        console.log("WebSocket connected");
                    };

                    tempWS.onmessage = (event) => {
                        count = 0;
                        //Do something action
                    };

                    tempWS.onclose = () => {
                        console.log("WebSocket closed");
                        if (ObjectUtil.isObject(webSocket)) {
                            webSocket.close();
                        }
                        webSocket = null;
                    };

                    webSocket = tempWS;
                    window.onbeforeunload = () => {
                        try {
                            webSocket.close();
                        } catch (e) {
                            // nothing to be done
                        }
                    };
                } else {
                    console.log("webSocket is not supported");
                }
            }
        }
    });
};

const heartCheck = {
    heartbeatTimeout: 10000, // ms
    hearbeatTask: null,
    hearbeatContent: "{\"router\":\"heartbeat\"}",
    start() {
        if (ObjectUtil.isObject(this.hearbeatTask)) {
            clearInterval(this.hearbeatTask);
            this.hearbeatTask = null;
        }
        this.hearbeatTask = setInterval(() => {
            console.log("---beat:" + new Date());
            try {
                count += 1;
                if (webSocket === null) {
                    count = 0;
                    createWebSocket();
                    return;
                }
                if (count >= 3) {
                    count = 0;
                    if (ObjectUtil.isObject(webSocket)) {
                        webSocket.close();
                    }
                    webSocket = null;
                    return;
                }
                if (ObjectUtil.isObject(webSocket)) {
                    webSocket.send(this.hearbeatContent);
                }
            } catch (e) {
                // nothing to be done
            }
        }, this.heartbeatTimeout);
    }
};
heartCheck.start();
const connect = () => {
    createWebSocket();
};
return {
    connect
};

}());

Object.freeze(MobileWebSocket);

entry.title: JavaСИІOracleSQLForField_IN
entry.content:
JavaСИІOracleSQL For Field_IN

SQLТїЄС╗цу»ёСЙІ

entry.title: Intro to Jedis Part 1
entry.content:
Intro to Jedis Part 1

Jedis is a client library in Java for Redis.
The popular in-memory data structure store that can persist on disk as well.

Maven Dependencies:

redis.clients jedis 3.3.0

Redis Installation:

You will need to install and fire up one of the latest versions of Redis.
We are running the latest stable version at this moment (3.2.1), but any post 3.x version should be okay.

After that we can directly dive in and connect to it from our Java code:
Jedis jedis = new Jedis();

Strings:

Strings are the most basic kind of Redis value, useful for when you need to persist simple key-value data types:
jedis.set(Рђюevents/city/ipРђЮ, Рђю55.44.33.22РђЮ);
String cachedResponse = jedis.get(Рђюevents/city/ipРђЮ);

Lists:

Redis Lists are simply lists of strings, sorted by insertion order and make it an ideal tool to implement, for instance, message queues:
jedis.lpush(Рђюqueue#tasksРђЮ, РђюfirstTaskРђЮ);
jedis.lpush(Рђюqueue#tasksРђЮ, РђюsecondTaskРђЮ);

String task = jedis.rpop(Рђюqueue#tasksРђЮ);
The variable task will hold the value firstTask. Remember that you can serialize any object and persist it as a string,
so messages in the queue can carry more complex data when required.

Sets:

Redis Sets are an unordered collection of Strings that come in handy when you want to exclude repeated members:
jedis.sadd(РђюnicknamesРђЮ, Рђюnickname#1РђЮ);
jedis.sadd(РђюnicknamesРђЮ, Рђюnickname#2РђЮ);
jedis.sadd(РђюnicknamesРђЮ, Рђюnickname#1РђЮ);

Set nicknames = jedis.smembers(РђюnicknamesРђЮ);
boolean exists = jedis.sismember(РђюnicknamesРђЮ, Рђюnickname#1РђЮ);
The Java Set nicknames will have a size of 2, the second addition of nickname#1 was ignored.
Also, the exists variable will have a value of true, the method sismember enables you to check for the existence of a particular member quickly.

Hashes:

Redis Hashes are mapping between String fields and String values:
jedis.hset(Рђюuser#1РђЮ, РђюnameРђЮ, РђюPeterРђЮ);
jedis.hset(Рђюuser#1РђЮ, РђюjobРђЮ, РђюpoliticianРђЮ);

String name = jedis.hget(Рђюuser#1РђЮ, РђюnameРђЮ);

Map<String, String> fields = jedis.hgetAll(Рђюuser#1РђЮ);
String job = fields.get(РђюjobРђЮ);
As you can see, hashes are a very convenient data type when you want to access objectРђЎs properties individually
since you do not need to retrieve the whole object.

Sorted Sets:

Sorted Sets are like a Set where each member has an associated ranking, that is used for sorting them:
Map<String, Double> scores = new HashMap<>();

scores.put(РђюPlayerOneРђЮ, 3000.0);
scores.put(РђюPlayerTwoРђЮ, 1500.0);
scores.put(РђюPlayerThreeРђЮ, 8200.0);

scores.entrySet().forEach(playerScore -> {
jedis.zadd(key, playerScore.getValue(), playerScore.getKey());
});

String player = jedis.zrevrange(РђюrankingРђЮ, 0, 1).iterator().next();
long rank = jedis.zrevrank(РђюrankingРђЮ, РђюPlayerOneРђЮ);

The variable player will hold the value PlayerThree because we are retrieving the top 1 player and he is the one with the highest score.
The rank variable will have a value of 1 because PlayerOne is the second in the ranking and the ranking is zero-based.

entry.title: Intro to Jedis Part 2
entry.content:
Intro to Jedis Part 2

Transactions:

Transactions guarantee atomicity and thread safety operations, which means that requests
from other clients will never be handled concurrently during Redis transactions:
String friendsPrefix = Рђюfriends#РђЮ;
String userOneId = Рђю4352523РђЮ;
String userTwoId = Рђю5552321РђЮ;

Transaction t = jedis.multi();
t.sadd(friendsPrefix + userOneId, userTwoId);
t.sadd(friendsPrefix + userTwoId, userOneId);
t.exec();

You can even make a transaction success dependent on a specific key
by РђюwatchingРђЮ it right before you instantiate your Transaction:

Pipelining:

When we have to send multiple commands, we can pack them together in one request and save connection overhead by using pipelines,
it is essentially a network optimization. As long as the operations are mutually independent, we can take advantage of this technique:
String userOneId = Рђю4352523РђЮ;
String userTwoId = Рђю4849888РђЮ;

Pipeline p = jedis.pipelined();
p.sadd(Рђюsearched#РђЮ + userOneId, РђюparisРђЮ);
p.zadd(РђюrankingРђЮ, 126, userOneId);
p.zadd(РђюrankingРђЮ, 325, userTwoId);
Response pipeExists = p.sismember(Рђюsearched#РђЮ + userOneId, РђюparisРђЮ);
Response<Set> pipeRanking = p.zrange(РђюrankingРђЮ, 0, -1);
p.sync();

String exists = pipeExists.get();
Set ranking = pipeRanking.get();

Notice we do not get direct access to the command responses, instead, weРђЎre given a Response instance
from which we can request the underlying response after the pipeline has been synced.

Publish/Subscribe:

*Subscriber
Subscribe and listen to messages sent to a channel:

Jedis jSubscriber = new Jedis();
jSubscriber.subscribe(new JedisPubSub() {
@Override
public void onMessage(String channel, String message) {
// handle message
}
}, РђюchannelРђЮ);

*Publisher
Then simply send messages to that same channel from the publisherРђЎs thread:

Jedis jPublisher = new Jedis();
jPublisher.publish(РђюchannelРђЮ, Рђюtest messageРђЮ);

Connection Pooling:

A pool that is thread safe and reliable as long as you return the resource to the pool when you are done with it.
LetРђЎs create the JedisPool:

Now we can make use of our pool from anywhere in the application when needed:

We used the Java try-with-resources statement to avoid having to manually close the Jedis resource,
but if you cannot use this statement you can also close the resource manually in the finally clause.

entry.title: ORACLE TYPE INTEGER_ARRAY VERSUS NUMBER_ARRAY
entry.content:
ORACLE TYPE INTEGER_ARRAY VERSUS NUMBER_ARRAY

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣ORACLE TYPE INTEGER_ARRAY VERSUS NUMBER_ARRAYсђѓ

Definition

TYPE INTEGER_ARRAY IS TABLE OF BINARY_INTEGER INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;
TYPE NUMBER_ARRAY IS TABLE OF NUMBER INDEX BY BINARY_INTEGER;

NUMBER : Numeric data, with a precision of p and scale of s. Precision p ranges from 1 to 38,
and scale ranges from -84 to 127.

INTEGER : Signed integer. Older , slower version of PLS_INTEGER. From -2,147,483,647 to
2,147,483,647.

СИђУѕгућежђћТЋИтГЌугдтљѕNUMBERтцДт░ЈжЂИТЊЄСй┐ућеNUMBER_ARRAYтЇ│тЈ»№╝їТюЅуЅ╣Т«іТЋИтГЌжюђТ▒ѓтЈ»жЂИТЊЄINTEGER_ARRAYсђѓ

entry.title: Redisson Replcated Mode
entry.content:
Redisson Replcated Mode

Replicated mode could be used with any hosting.
Replicated connection mode activated by follow line:

ReplicatedServersConfig replicatedConfig = config.useReplicatedServers();

Replicated ServersConfig settings listed below:

Replicated Programmatic config:

Config config = new Config();
config.useReplicatedServers()
.setScanInterval(2000) // master node change scan interval
// use Рђюrediss://Рђю for SSL connection
.addNodeAddress(Рђюredis://127.0.0.1:7000РђЮ, Рђюredis://127.0.0.1:7001РђЮ)
.addNodeAddress(Рђюredis://127.0.0.1:7002РђЮ);

RedissonClient redisson = Redisson.create(config);

Replicated settings:

nodeAddresses
Add Redis node address in host:port format. Multiple nodes could be added at once. All nodes (master and slaves) should be defined. Use rediss:// protocol for SSL connection.

scanInterval
Default value: 1000

Replicated node scan interval in milliseconds.

loadBalancer
Default value: org.redisson.connection.balancer.RoundRobinLoadBalancer

лАonnection load balancer for multiple Redis servers. Available implementations:
org.redisson.connection.balancer.WeightedRoundRobinBalancer
org.redisson.connection.balancer.RoundRobinLoadBalancer
org.redisson.connection.balancer.RandomLoadBalancer

dnsMonitoringInterval
Default value: 5000

Interval in milliseconds to check the endpointРђЎs DNS. Applications must ensure the JVM DNS cache TTL is low enough to support this. Set -1 to disable.

subscriptionConnectionMinimumIdleSize
Default value: 1

Redis РђўslaveРђЎ node minimum idle subscription (pub/sub) connection amount for each slave node

subscriptionConnectionPoolSize
Default value: 50

Redis РђўslaveРђЎ node maximum subscription (pub/sub) connection pool size for each slave node

slaveConnectionMinimumIdleSize
Default value: 24

Redis РђўslaveРђЎ node minimum idle connection amount for each slave node

slaveConnectionPoolSize
Default value: 64

Redis РђўslaveРђЎ node maximum connection pool size for each slave node

masterConnectionMinimumIdleSize
Default value: 24

Redis РђўmasterРђЎ node minimum idle connection amount for each slave node. Redisson idle connections are remain for elected slave as master.
Because this node remains in slave connection pool but in non-active state.
These connections are preserved for case when your cluster lost all slaves. In this case master used as slave and idle-connections become in use.

masterConnectionPoolSize
Default value: 64

Redis РђўmasterРђЎ node maximum connection pool size

idleConnectionTimeout
Default value: 10000

If pooled connection not used for a timeout time and current connections amount bigger than minimum idle connections pool size,
then it will closed and removed from pool. Value in milliseconds.

readMode
Default value: SLAVE

Set node type used for read operation. Available values:
SLAVE - Read from slave nodes, uses MASTER if no SLAVES are available.
MASTER - Read from master node,
MASTER_SLAVE - Read from master and slave nodes

subscriptionMode
Default value: MASTER

Set node type used for subscription operation. Available values:
SLAVE - Subscribe to slave nodes,
MASTER - Subscribe to master node,

connectTimeout
Default value: 10000

Timeout during connecting to any Redis server.

timeout
Default value: 3000

Redis server response timeout. Starts to countdown when Redis command was succesfully sent. Value in milliseconds.

retryAttempts
Default value: 3

Error will be thrown if Redis command canРђЎt be sended to Redis server after retryAttempts. But if it sent succesfully then timeout will be started.

retryInterval
Default value: 1500

Time interval after which another one attempt to send Redis command will be executed. Value in milliseconds.

failedSlaveReconnectionInterval
Default value: 3000

Interval of Redis Slave reconnection attempt when it was excluded from internal list of available servers.
On each timeout event Redisson tries to connect to disconnected Redis server. Value in milliseconds.

failedSlaveCheckInterval
Default value: 60000

Redis Slave node failing to execute commands is excluded from the internal list of available nodes when the time interval
from the moment of first Redis command execution failure on this server reaches defined value. Value in milliseconds.

database
Default value: 0

Database index used for Redis connection

password
Default value: null

Password for Redis server authentication.

subscriptionsPerConnection
Default value: 5

Subscriptions per Redis connection limit

clientName
Default value: null

Name of client connection

sslEnableEndpointIdentification
Default value: true

Enables SSL endpoint identification.

sslProvider
Default value: JDK

Defines SSL provider (JDK or OPENSSL) used to handle SSL connections.

sslTruststore
Default value: null

Defines path to SSL truststore

sslTruststorePassword
Default value: null

Defines password for SSL truststore

sslKeystore
Default value: null

Defines path to SSL keystore

sslKeystorePassword
Default value: null

Defines password for SSL keystore

pingConnectionInterval
Default value: 0

Defines PING command sending interval per connection to Redis. Set 0 to disable.

keepAlive
Default value: false

Enables TCP keepAlive for connection.

tcpNoDelay
Default value: false

Enables TCP noDelay for connection.

Replicated YAML config format:

Below is replicated configuration example in YAML format.
All property names matches with ReplicatedServersConfig and Config object property names.

replicatedServersConfig:
idleConnectionTimeout: 10000
connectTimeout: 10000
timeout: 3000
retryAttempts: 3
retryInterval: 1500
failedSlaveReconnectionInterval: 3000
failedSlaveCheckInterval: 60000
password: null
subscriptionsPerConnection: 5
clientName: null
loadBalancer: !<org.redisson.connection.balancer.RoundRobinLoadBalancer> {}
subscriptionConnectionMinimumIdleSize: 1
subscriptionConnectionPoolSize: 50
slaveConnectionMinimumIdleSize: 24
slaveConnectionPoolSize: 64
masterConnectionMinimumIdleSize: 24
masterConnectionPoolSize: 64
readMode: РђюSLAVEРђЮ
subscriptionMode: РђюSLAVEРђЮ
nodeAddresses:

  • Рђюredis://127.0.0.1:2812РђЮ
  • Рђюredis://127.0.0.1:2815РђЮ
  • Рђюredis://127.0.0.1:2813РђЮ
    scanInterval: 1000
    threads: 16
    nettyThreads: 32
    codec: !<org.redisson.codec.FstCodec> {}
    transportMode: РђюNIOРђЮ

entry.title: Refactor ComposingMethods Replace Temp with Query
entry.content:
Refactor-ComposingMethods:Replace Temp with Query

тюежЄЇТДІуџёComposing methodsСИГ№╝їТюЅУе▒тцџжЄЇТДІТќ╣Т│ЋсђѓжђЎу»Єт░ЄС╗Іу┤╣Replace Temp with QueryуџёСй┐ућеТќ╣Т│Ћсђѓ

Problem & Solution

Problem:You place the result of an expression in a local variable for later use in your code.
Solution:Move the entire expression to a separate method and return the result from it.
Query the method instead of using a variable. Incorporate the new method in other methods, if necessary.

Example by Java before Rafactor

Example by Java after Rafactor

Why Refactor

This refactoring can lay the groundwork for applying Extract Method for a portion of a very long method.

The same expression may sometimes be found in other methods as well, which is one reason to consider creating a common method.

Benefits

Code readability. ItРђЎs much easier to understand the purpose of the method getTax() than the line orderPrice() * 0.2.

Slimmer code via deduplication, if the line being replaced is used in multiple methods.

Good to Know

Performance
This refactoring may prompt the question of whether this approach is liable to cause a performance hit.
The honest answer is: yes, itРђЎs, since the resulting code may be burdened by querying a new method.
But with todayРђЎs fast CPUs and excellent compilers, the burden will almost always be minimal.
By contrast, readable code and the ability to reuse this method in other places in program codeРђћthanks
to this refactoring approachРђћare very noticeable benefits.

Nonetheless, if your temp variable is used to cache the result of a truly time-consuming expression,
you may want to stop this refactoring after extracting the expression to a new method.

How to Refactor

Make sure that a value is assigned to the variable once and only once within the method.
If not, use Split Temporary Variable to ensure that the variable will be used only to store the result of your expression.

Use Extract Method to place the expression of interest in a new method.
Make sure that this method only returns a value and doesnРђЎt change the state of the object.
If the method affects the visible state of the object, use Separate Query from Modifier.

Replace the variable with a query to your new method.

entry.title: Refactor ComposingMethods ExtractMethod
entry.content:
Refactor-ComposingMethods:ExtractMethod

тюежЄЇТДІуџёComposing methodsСИГ№╝їуггСИђтђІТюђтЪ║ТюгуџёТќ╣Т│Ћт░▒Тў»
Extract MethodсђѓжђЎу»Єт░ЄС╗Іу┤╣Extract MethodуџёСй┐ућеТќ╣Т│Ћсђѓ

Problem & Solution:

Problem:You have a code fragment that can be grouped together.
Solution:Move this code to a separate new method (or function) and replace the old code with a call to the method.

Example by Java before Rafactor:

void printOwing() {
printBanner();

// Print details.
System.out.println(Рђюname: Рђю + name);
System.out.println(Рђюamount: Рђю + getOutstanding());
}

Example by Java after Rafactor:

void printOwing() {
printBanner();
printDetails(getOutstanding());
}

void printDetails(double outstanding) {
System.out.println(Рђюname: Рђю + name);
System.out.println(Рђюamount: Рђю + outstanding);
}

Why Refactor:

The more lines found in a method, the harder itРђЎs to figure out what the method does. This is the main reason for this refactoring.

Besides eliminating rough edges in your code, extracting methods is also a step in many other refactoring approaches.

Benefits:

More readable code! Be sure to give the new method a name that describes the methodРђЎs purpose: createOrder(), renderCustomerInfo(), etc.

Less code duplication. Often the code thatРђЎs found in a method can be reused in other places in your program. So you can replace duplicates with calls to your new method.

Isolates independent parts of code, meaning that errors are less likely (such as if the wrong variable is modified).

How to Refactor:

Create a new method and name it in a way that makes its purpose self-evident.

Copy the relevant code fragment to your new method. Delete the fragment from its old location and put a call for the new method there instead.

Find all variables used in this code fragment. If theyРђЎre declared inside the fragment and not used outside of it,
simply leave them unchangedРђћtheyРђЎll become local variables for the new method.

If the variables are declared prior to the code that youРђЎre extracting, you will need to pass these variables to the parameters of your new method
in order to use the values previously contained in them. Sometimes itРђЎs easier to get rid of these variables by resorting to Replace Temp with Query.

If you see that a local variable changes in your extracted code in some way, this may mean that this changed value will be needed later in your main method.
Double-check! And if this is indeed the case, return the value of this variable to the main method to keep everything functioning.

entry.title: Refactor ComposingMethods ExtractVariable
entry.content:
Refactor-ComposingMethods:ExtractVariable

тюежЄЇТДІуџёComposing methodsСИГ№╝їТюЅУе▒тцџжЄЇТДІТќ╣Т│ЋсђѓжђЎу»Єт░ЄС╗Іу┤╣Extract VariableуџёСй┐ућеТќ╣Т│Ћсђѓ

Problem & Solution:

Problem:You have an expression thatРђЎs hard to understand.
Solution:Place the result of the expression or its parts in separate variables that are self-explanatory.

Example by Java before Rafactor:

void renderBanner() {
if ((platform.toUpperCase().indexOf(РђюMACРђЮ) > -1) &&
(browser.toUpperCase().indexOf(РђюIEРђЮ) > -1) &&
wasInitialized() && resize > 0 )
{
// do something
}
}

Example by Java after Rafactor:

void renderBanner() {
final boolean isMacOs = platform.toUpperCase().indexOf(РђюMACРђЮ) > -1;
final boolean isIE = browser.toUpperCase().indexOf(РђюIEРђЮ) > -1;
final boolean wasResized = resize > 0;

if (isMacOs && isIE && wasInitialized() && wasResized) {
// do something
}
}

Why Refactor:

The main reason for extracting variables is to make a complex expression more understandable, by dividing it into its intermediate parts.
These could be:Condition of the if() operator or a part of the ?: operator in C-based languages

A long arithmetic expression without intermediate results
Long multipart lines
Extracting a variable may be the first step towards performing Extract Method if you see that the extracted expression is used in other places in your code.

Benefits:

More readable code! Try to give the extracted variables good names that announce the variableРђЎs purpose loud and clear.
More readability, fewer long-winded comments. Go for names like customerTaxValue, cityUnemploymentRate, clientSalutationString, etc.

Drawbacks:

More variables are present in your code. But this is counterbalanced by the ease of reading your code.

When refactoring conditional expressions, remember that the compiler will most likely optimize it to minimize the amount of calculations
needed to establish the resulting value. Say you have a following expression if (a() || b()) Рђд. The program wonРђЎt call the method b
if the method a returns true because the resulting value will still be true, no matter what value returns b.

However, if you extract parts of this expression into variables, both methods will always be called,
which might hurt performance of the program, especially if these methods do some heavyweight work.

How to Refactor:

Insert a new line before the relevant expression and declare a new variable there. Assign part of the complex expression to this variable.

Replace that part of the expression with the new variable.

Repeat the process for all complex parts of the expression.

entry.title: SessionУѕЄCookieти«тѕЦ
entry.content:
SessionУѕЄCookieти«тѕЦ

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣тюеуђЈУдйтЎеуџёСИќуЋїСИГ№╝їтИИућеуџёSessionтњїcookieсђѓ
HTTPТюгУ║ФТў»тђІуёАуІђТЁІ(Stateless)уџётЇћт«џ№╝їтЈ»С╗ЦтюеClientУѕЄServerтЁЕуФ»жђ▓УАїТ║Южђџ№╝їСйєТў»уёАТ│Ћу┤ђжїёуХ▓Уи»СИіуџёУАїуѓ║сђѓ
CookieтњїSessionтЏаТГцУфЋућЪ№╝їућеСЙєУДБТ▒║уёАу┤ђжїёуІђТЁІуџётЋЈжАїсђѓ

Cookie:

ућ▒ServerжђЂухдСй┐ућеУђЁуђЈУдйтЎеуџёСИђт░ЈтАіУ│ЄТќЎ(ТќЄТфћ)сђѓ
уђЈУдйтЎеТюЃтё▓тГўт«ЃСИдСИћтюеуђЈУдйтЎеСИІСИђТгАуЎ╝жђЂУдЂТ▒ѓуџёТЎѓтђЎт░Єт«ЃжђЂтЏътјЪТюгжђЂСЙєуџёС╝║ТюЇтЎесђѓ
тЪ║ТюгСИі№╝їт«ЃТў»ућеСЙєтЇђтѕєтЁЕтђІУдЂТ▒ѓТў»СЙєУЄфтљїСИђтђІуђЈУдйтЎе Рђћ С╗ЦТГцтј╗С┐ЮТїЂСй┐ућеУђЁуџёуЎ╗тЁЦуІђТЁІсђѓ
СЙІтдѓ№╝їт«ЃТЈљСЙЏС║єС┐ЮтГўуІђТЁІУ│ЄУеіуџётіЪУЃй№╝їСЙєт╣ФтіЕHTTPжђЎтђІуёАТ│Ћу┤ђжїёуІђТЁІуџёжђџУеітЇћт«џсђѓ

Cookie ућ▒уђЈУдйтЎеУЎЋуљє№╝їтЁиТюЅтЁЕтђІуЅ╣ТђД№╝џ
уЅ╣т«џуХ▓тЪЪ№╝џтЈфжЄЮт░ЇтјЪТюгуџё уХ▓тЪЪ(domain) УхиСйюућесђѓУѕЅСЙІ: тюе *.gaagle.com тГўтЁЦуџё Cookie№╝їСИЇТюЃтЄ║уЈЙтюе *.not-gaagle.com
ТюЅућЪтЉйТюЪжЎљ: тѕ░С║єТЅђУеГт«џуџёућЪтЉйТюЪжЎљС╣ІтЙїТюЃтц▒ТЋѕсђѓтљЉжђЎтђІdomainуџёserverуЎ╝жђЂУФІТ▒ѓТЎѓ№╝їС╣ЪТюЃУбФСИђСйхтИХжђ▓тј╗УЕ▓УФІТ▒ѓСИГсђѓ

у╝║ж╗ъ:CookieСИГуџёТЅђТюЅТЋИТЊџтюеClientуФ»т░▒тЈ»С╗ЦУбФС┐«Тћ╣№╝їТЋИТЊџжЮътИИт«╣ТўЊУбФтЂйжђа№╝їжѓБж║╝СИђС║ЏжЄЇУдЂуџёТЋИТЊџт░▒СИЇУЃйтГўТћЙтюеCookieсђѓ

Session:

SessionУ▓аУ▓гу┤ђжїётюеserverуФ»СИіуџёСй┐ућеУђЁУеіТЂ»№╝їТюЃтюеСИђтђІућеТѕХт«їТѕљУ║ФтѕєУфЇУГЅтЙї№╝їтГўСИІТЅђжюђуџёућеТѕХУ│ЄТќЎ№╝ї
ТјЦУЉЌућбућЪСИђухёт░ЇТЄЅуџё ID№╝їтГўтЁЦ Cookie тЙїтѓ│тЏъућеТѕХуФ»сђѓ SessionТ│ЏТїЄТюЅтДІТюЅухѓуџёу│╗тѕЌтІЋСйю/ТХѕТЂ»сђѓ

ClientуФ»уџёRequestт╗║СИђтђІSessionуџёТЎѓтђЎ№╝їServerТюЃтЁѕТфбТЪЦжђЎтђІClientуФ»уџёRequestУБАТў»тљдТюЅтїЁтљФС║єSessionТеЎУГў(Session id)№╝ї
тдѓТъюти▓тїЁтљФСИђтђІSession id№╝їУАеуц║жђЎтђІуЎ╝УхиRequestуџёClientуФ»Тў»ти▓уХЊтГўТћЙжЂјуџёid№╝їServerт░▒ТїЅуЁДSession id№╝їТііжђЎтђІSessionТЅЙтЄ║СЙєСй┐ућесђѓ
СйєтдѓТъюClientуФ»УФІТ▒ѓСИЇтїЁтљФSession id№╝ї№╝їтЅЄУАеуц║С╗ќТў»Тќ░УЄЅтГћ№╝їжѓБServerуФ»т░▒уѓ║ТГцClientуФ»тЅхт╗║СИђтђІSession№╝їСИдућЪТѕљСИђтђІSession id№╝їСИдResponseухдClientуФ»С┐ЮтГўсђѓ

ухљУФќ:

Session№╝џтИ│УЎЪуЎ╗жїёжЕЌУГЅжЂјтЙї№╝їServerуФ»ТЅђуЎ╝уџёУГўтѕЦУГЅ
Cookie№╝џТў»уђЈУдйтЎетГўТћЙУ│ЄТќЎуџётю░Тќ╣№╝їтЈ»С╗ЦтГўТћЙseesionС╣ІжАъуџёУ│ЄТќЎ

entry.title: Share Cache CreateAndGet Versus Get
entry.content:
Share Cache CreateAndGet Versus Get

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣Cache CreateAndGet Versus Getсђѓ

Example

private ConcurrentMap<Integer, ConcurrentMap<Integer, String>> cache = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

createAndGet:

public final String createAndGet(Integer num1, Integer num2) {
return cache.computeIfAbsent(num1, x -> new ConcurrentHashMap<>()).computeIfAbsent(num2,
x -> РђюTESTРђЮ);
}

Get:

public final Optional get(Integer num1, Integer num2) {
ConcurrentMap<Integer, String> indicator = cache.get(num1);

return (indicator == null) ? Optional.empty() : Optional.ofNullable(indicator.get(num2));

}

тЁЕтђІТќ╣Т│ЋТ»ћУ╝ЃС╣ІСИІ№╝їgetуџётЪиУАїТЎѓжќЊтњїУеўТєХжФћСй┐ућежЄЈжЃйтёфТќ╝createAndGetсђѓ
ТЋЁтѕЮтДІтїќТЎѓСй┐ућеcreateAndGet№╝їтЙїу║їжЃйтЈќcacheтђ╝жЃйућеgetсђѓ

entry.title: StaticClassУѕЄNon-StaticClassти«уЋ░
entry.content:
Difference between static and non-static class

STATIC CLASS:

Static class is defined using static keyword.
In static class, you are not allowed to create objects.
The data members of static class can be directly accessed by its class name.
Static class always contains static members.
Static class does not contain an instance constructor.
Static class cannot inherit from another class.

NON-STATIC CLASS:

Non-Static class is not defined by using static keyword.
In non-static class, you are allowed to create objects using new keyword.
The data members of non-static class is not directly accessed by its class name.
Non-static class may contain both static and non-static methods.
Non-static class contains an instance constructor.
Non-static class can be inherited from another class.

entry.title: TypeScript-Arithmetic
entry.content:
TypeScript-Arithmetic

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣тдѓСйЋућеTypeScriptТњ░т»ФтЏЏтЅЄжЂІу«Ќ(тіаТИЏС╣ўжЎц)сђѓ

TypeScriptТЈљСЙЏт╝итъІтѕЦуџёJavaScriptУфъТ│Ћ№╝їт░ЇуєЪТѓЅтЙїуФ»Тњ░т»ФуџётиЦуеІтИФ
СЙєт»ФJavaScriptтцџС║єСИђС╗йт«ЅтЁеТёЪ№╝їуЏИт░Їт╝▒тъІтѕЦJavaScriptТЏ┤т«╣ТўЊТЈљтЅЇ
debugсђѓ

тіаТ│Ћ:

export function add(arg1: number, arg2: number): number {
let s1 = arg1.toString();
let s2 = arg2.toString();

let len1 = s1.length - (s1.indexOf(Рђю.РђЮ) + 1);
let len2 = s2.length - (s2.indexOf(Рђю.РђЮ) + 1);

let m = Math.pow(10, Math.max(len1, len2));
return (multiply(arg1, m) + multiply(arg2, m)) / m;
}

ТИЏТ│Ћ:

export function subtract(arg1: number, arg2: number): number {
let s1 = arg1.toString();
let s2 = arg2.toString();

let len1 = s1.length - (s1.indexOf(Рђю.РђЮ) + 1);
let len2 = s2.length - (s2.indexOf(Рђю.РђЮ) + 1);

let m = Math.pow(10, Math.max(len1, len2));
return (multiply(arg1, m) - multiply(arg2, m)) / m;
}

С╣ўТ│Ћ:

export function multiply(arg1: f64, arg2: f64): f64 {
let s1 = arg1.toString();
let s2 = arg2.toString();
return mul(s1, s2);
}

function mul(s1: string, s2: string): f64 {

let len1 = s1.length - (s1.indexOf(Рђю.РђЮ) + 1);
let len2 = s2.length - (s2.indexOf(Рђю.РђЮ) + 1);

let r1 = Number.parseInt(s1.replace(Рђю.РђЮ, РђюРђЮ), 10);
let r2 = Number.parseInt(s2.replace(Рђю.РђЮ, РђюРђЮ), 10);

return r1 * r2 / Math.pow(10, len1 + len2);
}

жЎцТ│Ћ:

export function divide(arg1: number, arg2: number): number {
let s1 = arg1.toString();
let s2 = arg2.toString();

let len1 = s1.length - (s1.indexOf(Рђю.РђЮ) + 1);
let len2 = s2.length - (s2.indexOf(Рђю.РђЮ) + 1);

let r1 = Number.parseInt(s1.replace(Рђю.РђЮ, РђюРђЮ), 10);
let r2 = Number.parseInt(s2.replace(Рђю.РђЮ, РђюРђЮ), 10);
return multiply((r1 / r2), Math.pow(10, len2 - len1));
}

Reference:
https://www.typescripttutorial.net/

entry.title: Using Nginx As HTTP Load Balancer
entry.content:
Using Nginx As HTTP Load Balancer

Load balancing across multiple application instances is a commonly used technique for optimizing resource utilization,
maximizing throughput, reducing latency, and ensuring fault-tolerant configurations.
It is possible to use nginx as a very efficient HTTP load balancer to distribute traffic to several application servers
and to improve performance, scalability and reliability of web applications with nginx.

Load balancing methods

Default load balancing configuration

Least connected load balancing

Session persistence (ip_hash)

Weighted load balancing

entry.title: Versus HTTP Different Version
entry.content:
Intro http1.0 versus http1.1 versus http1.2

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣http1.0 versus http1.1 versus http1.2сђѓ

<= HTTP 1.0:

тюеHTTP 1.0СИГтЄ║уЈЙуџёТаИт┐ЃтЋЈжАїТў»тѓ│У╝ИТЋИТЊџТЎѓСИдТ▓њТюЅУ│ЄТќЎухљТЮЪуџёжѓіуЋї№╝ї
ТЅђС╗ЦућеСИђуе«Тџ┤тіЏуџёТќ╣т╝ЈСЙєУДБТ▒║№╝їС╣ЪТў»Т»Јжђ▓УАїСИђТгАHTTPтѓ│У╝И№╝ї
т░▒т┐Ёжаѕт╗║уФІСИђТбЮTCP Connect№╝їтюетѓ│У╝ИухљТЮЪтЙї№╝їжЃйжюђУдЂТќижќІСИђТгАTCP connectсђѓ
Т»ЈТгАт╗║уФІTCP connect№╝їжЃйжюђУдЂуХЊжЂјСИЅТгАТЈАТЅІ№╝їтіаСИіTCPжЌюжќЅжюђУдЂтЏЏТгАТЈАТЅІсђѓ
Т»ћуЁД1.1тњї1.2СЙєУффжЮътИИУђЌУ▓╗У│ЄТ║љсђѓ

HTTP 1.1:

HTTP 1.1т░јтЁЦKeep-AliveТЕЪтѕХ№╝їdefaultуѓ║жќІтЋЪсђѓтЈ»жђЈжЂјConnection:close
жЌюжќЅсђѓтюеHTTPтѓ│У╝ИТЎѓ№╝їУІЦтЋЪућеKeep-AliveТЕЪтѕХ№╝їУЕ▓жђБухљСИЇТюЃуФІтЇ│жЌюжќЅсђѓ
УІЦТюЅТќ░уџёrequestжђ▓СЙє№╝їСИћhost & port уЏИтљїТЎѓ№╝їтЅЄТюЃreuseжђЎТбЮTCP connectсђѓ
ТИЏт░ЉTCP connectжа╗у╣Ђт╗║уФІУѕЄcloseуџёУ│ЄТ║љТХѕУђЌсђѓ

HTTP 1.1жѓёТюЅСИђтђІKeep-Alive request Header№╝їтЈ»С╗ЦУеГуй«timeoutтњїmaxсђѓ
ућеСЙєТїЄт«џIdle connectС┐ЮТїЂopenуџёТЎѓжќЊ№╝їС╗ЦтЈіжђБТјЦжЌюжќЅтЅЇжђЎТбЮconnectтЈ»С╗Ц
уЎ╝жђЂrequestуџёТюђтцДтђ╝сђѓ

How To Solve HTTPу▓ўтїЁтЋЈжАї:

уЈЙтюетцџтђІHTTP request№╝їтЈ»С╗ЦreuseтљїСИђТбЮTCP connectсђѓ
т«ЃТў»жђЈжЂјContect-Length жђЎтђІHeaderУДБТ▒║уџёсђѓт«ЃУАеТўјС║єdata
ТЅђСйћућеуџётцДт░ЈсђѓтЈ»С╗ЦжђЈжЂјт«ЃСЙєуб║т«џжђЎтђІData PacketуџёжѓіуЋї№╝їжЂ┐тЁЇу▓ўтїЁсђѓ

HTTP 1.2:

HTTP 1.1тГўтюеуџёу╝║жЎитЋЈжАї
1.тдѓТъюclientТЃ│УдЂуЎ╝Ухиconcurrent requests№╝їтЅЄт┐Ёжаѕт╗║уФІтцџтђІTCP Connect№╝ї
жђЎт░ЇуХ▓Уи»У│ЄТ║љуџёТХѕУђЌТў»жЮътИИтџ┤жЄЇуџёсђѓ
2.СИЇУЃйт░ЇrequestтЈіresponseуџёHeaderжђ▓УАїтБЊуИ«№╝їжђаТѕљуХ▓Уи»ТхЂжЄЈуџёТхфУ▓╗сђѓ

HTTP 1.2т░јтЁЦMultiplexingТЕЪтѕХ-
MultiplexingУѕЄKeep-AliveуџётЇђтѕЦ:
1.Keep-AliveТ▓њТюЅУДБТ▒║requestжў╗тАътЋЈжАї№╝їжюђУдЂуГЅСИіСИђтђІrequestухљТЮЪтЙї№╝ї
ТЅЇУЃйтЙЕућеУЕ▓TCP connectжђ▓УАїСИІСИђтђІrequestсђѓ
2.HTTP 1.2т░јтЁЦData FrameТдѓт┐х№╝їСй┐тцџтђІrequestsтЈ»С╗ЦтљїТЎѓтюеТхЂСИГжђ▓УАїтѓ│У╝Исђѓ
3.HTTP 1.2 ТјАуће HPACKтБЊуИ«Т╝ћу«ЌТ│Ћт░ЇHeaderжђ▓УАїтБЊуИ«№╝їжЎЇСйјС║єrequestуџёТхЂжЄЈсђѓ

entry.title: Upgrade Jenkins Docker Image Version
entry.content:
Upgrade Jenkins Docker Image Version

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣Upgrade Jenkins Docker Image Versionсђѓ

JenkinsуЎ╝Сйѕ
Jenkins 2.427 and earlier, LTS 2.414.2 and earlier bundles versions of Jetty affected by
the security vulnerabilities CVE-2023-36478 and CVE-2023-44487.
These vulnerabilities allow unauthenticated attackers to cause a denial of service.

Process:

$ docker stop jenkins
$ docker rm jenkins
$ docker run -itd РђЊname jenkins -v jenkins:/var/jenkins_home РђЊrestart always -p 18080:8080 {REPOSITORY}:{TAG}

Reference:
https://www.jenkins.io/security/advisory/2023-10-18/

entry.title: double vs. BigDecimal
entry.content:
double vs. BigDecimal

жђЎу»ЄС╗Іу┤╣doubleтњїBigDecimalтЁЕУђЁСИЇтљїС╗ЦтЈіСй┐ућеТЎѓТЕЪсђѓ

double тЪ║ТюгтъІтѕЦ:

doubleтъІтѕЦуџёСИ╗УдЂУеГУеѕуЏ«ТеЎТў»уѓ║С║єуДЉтГИУеѕу«ЌтњїтиЦуеІУеѕу«ЌсђѓС╗ќтђЉтЪиУАїС║їжђ▓СйЇтѕХТх«ж╗ъжЂІу«Ќ№╝їжђЎТў»уѓ║С║єтюет╗БтЪЪТЋИтђ╝у»ётюЇСИіТЈљСЙЏУ╝Ѓуѓ║у▓Йуб║уџёт┐ФжђЪУ┐ЉС╝╝Уеѕу«ЌУђїу▓Йт┐ЃУеГУеѕуџёсђѓ
уёХУђї№╝їт«ЃтђЉТ▓њТюЅТЈљСЙЏт«їтЁеу▓Йуб║уџёухљТъю№╝їТЅђС╗ЦСИЇТЄЅУЕ▓УбФућеТќ╝УдЂТ▒ѓу▓Йуб║ухљТъюуџёта┤тљѕсђѓСйєТў»№╝їтЋєТЦГУеѕу«ЌтЙђтЙђУдЂТ▒ѓухљТъюу▓Йуб║сђѓ
Double.MAX_VALUE : 1.7976931348623157E308

BigDecimal уЅЕС╗Х:

1.Т»ћУ╝ЃтцДт░ЈућеcompareTo()
public static int compareTo(double v1, double v2) {
return BigDecimalUtils.compareTo(getInstance(v1), new BigDecimal(Double.toString(v2)));
}
2.BigDecialТў»immutableуџё№╝їт░▒тЃЈStringСИђТеБ№╝їт«ЃуџёТЅђТюЅТЊЇСйюжЃйТюЃућЪТѕљСИђтђІТќ░уџёуЅЕС╗Х
3.СИЇУдЂућеequalsТќ╣Т│ЋСЙєТ»ћУ╝ЃBigDecimalуЅЕС╗Х№╝їтЏауѓ║т«ЃуџёequalsТќ╣Т│ЋТюЃТ»ћУ╝Ѓscale№╝їтдѓТъюscaleСИЇСИђТеБ№╝їт«ЃТюЃУ┐ћтЏъfalse

тЁЕУђЁТ»ћУ╝Ѓ:

doubleТў»тЪ║ТюгтъІтѕЦСй┐ућеУеўТєХжФћУ╝Ѓт░Љ№╝їBigDecimalТў»уЅЕС╗ХСй┐ућеУеўТєХжФћУ╝Ѓтцџ

Сй┐ућеТЎѓТЕЪ:

1.тюеТјЦТћХтЈЃТЋИТЎѓТЋИтђ╝УІЦт░ЈТќ╝Double.MAX_VALUE№╝їСй┐ућеdoubleтЪ║ТюгтъІтѕЦСЙєТјЦТћХтЈЃТЋИ
2.Уеѕу«Ќух▒СИђућеBigDecimalUtilsСЙєтЂџтіаТИЏС╣ўжЎц
3.тіаТ│Ћ

4.ТИЏТ│Ћ

entry.title: docker Versus podman
entry.content:
docker Versus podman

docker Versus podman

Versus:

Install
docker : yum install docker -y
podman : yum install podman -y

Start Service:
docker : systemctl start docker && systemctl enable docker
podman : Nothing to do

Store Path
docker : /var/lib/docker
podman : /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay-images

Pull images
docker : docker pull mysql or docker search mysql
podman : podman pull mysql or podman search mysql

Host Name
docker : Docker Host
podman : Container Host

Images
docker : Docker image (Read-Only)
podman : Container image (Read-Only)

Container
docker : Container (Read-Write)
podman : Container (Read-Write)

ухљУФќТў»podmanуЏИУ╝ЃТќ╝docker№╝їт░ЉтЋЪтІЋСИђтђІТюЇтІЎтІЋСйю№╝їуЏ┤ТјЦућеOpen Container Initiative(OCI)тЋЪтІЋContainerсђѓ

тюеLinuxТЕЪтЎеСИі
sh ТЪљтђІ .shТфћТАѕТЎѓтЄ║уЈЙ

тЄ║уЈЙТГцУеіТЂ»УАеуц║LinuxСйюТЦГу│╗ух▒уёАТ│Ћт╗║уФІТЏ┤тцџprocess

$ ulimit -a
СЙєТфбУдќуЏ«тЅЇуџёу│╗ух▒тЈЃТЋИ
ТюЃуюІтѕ░СИ╗УдЂтй▒жЪ┐уџётЈЃТЋИтдѓСИІ:
max user processes(-u)1024

тЈ»С╗ЦСй┐уће

ТГБуб║С┐«Тћ╣

$ * soft nproc 1024

entry.title: Intro Linux firewalld
entry.content:
Intro Linux firewalld

тюеУѕіуЅѕуџё CentOS Linux СИГ№╝їжў▓уЂФуЅєжЃйТў»С╗Цтѓ│ух▒уџёiptablesСЙєУеГт«џ№╝їУђїтЙъ CentOS 7 жќІтДІ№╝їтЅЄТћ╣уће firewalld СЙєу«Ауљєжў▓уЂФуЅєсђѓ

тѓ│ух▒уџё iptables тюеТ»ЈТгАС┐«Тћ╣жў▓уЂФуЅєТЎѓжЃйУдЂТИЁжЎцУѕіУдЈтЅЄ№╝їжЄЇТќ░тЦЌућеСИђТгАТќ░УдЈтЅЄ№╝їСй┐ућеСИіСИЇТў»тЙѕТќ╣СЙ┐№╝їУђїТќ░уџё firewalld С╗ЦтЇђтЪЪ№╝ѕzone№╝ЅуџёТќ╣т╝Ју«АуљєУдЈтЅЄ№╝ї
СИдСй┐ућетІЋТЁІуџёТќ╣т╝ЈтЪиУАї№╝їС┐«Тћ╣УдЈтЅЄтЙїтЈ»уФІтЇ│ућЪТЋѕ№╝їС╣ЪСИЇжюђУдЂжЄЇТќ░тЋЪтІЋу│╗ух▒уџёТюЇтІЎ№╝ѕservice Тѕќ daemon№╝Ѕ№╝ї
ТЅђС╗ЦтЙїСЙєуџё RHELсђЂCentOS УѕЄ Fedora жЃйТћ╣уће firewalld С║єсђѓ

iptables УѕЄ firewalld тЁЕтђІжў▓уЂФуЅєу«Ауљєу│╗ух▒тЈфУЃйжЂИућетЁХСИГСИђуе«№╝їСИЇтЈ»С╗ЦтљїТЎѓжќІтЋЪ№╝їтљдтЅЄТюЃТюЅтЋЈжАїсђѓ

т«ЅУБЮ firewalld

firewalld тюе RHEL/CentOS 7 УѕЄ Fedora 21 С╣ІСИГТЄЅУЕ▓Тў»жаљУеГт░▒ТюЃт«ЅУБЮтЦйуџё№╝їУІЦТѓеуџёу│╗ух▒СИіТ▓њТюЅт«ЅУБЮ№╝їтЈ»уће yum т«ЅУБЮ№╝џ

уЋХ firewalld т«ЅУБЮтЦйС╣ІтЙї№╝їТфбТЪЦ firewalld ТюЇтІЎТў»тљдТюЅтЋЪтІЋ№╝џ

УІЦ firewalld Т▓њТюЅтЋЪтІЋ№╝їтЅЄТЅІтІЋтЋЪтІЋт«Ѓ№╝џ

УІЦУдЂУеГт«џУ«Њ firewalld тюежќІТЕЪТЎѓУЄфтІЋтЋЪтІЋ№╝їтЈ»тЪиУАї№╝џ

entry.title: java util NoSuch Element Exception No value present
entry.content:
java.util.NoSuchElementException:No value present

ListтЪиУАїstream().findFirst().get()ТЎѓТюЃтЄ║уЈЙ
java.util.NoSuchElementException:No value presentжї»УфцУеіТЂ»сђѓ
С╗ЦСИІТЈљСЙЏуеІт╝ЈExampleтЈіуЏИжЌюУДБТ▒║Тќ╣Т│Ћ!

Example:

List list = new List();
list.add(РђюAРђЮ);
list.add(РђюBРђЮ);
list.add(РђюCРђЮ);
list.stream().filter(obj -> obj == РђюDРђЮ).findFirst().get();
//СИіСИђтЈЦУфъТ│ЋТюЃжђаТѕљjava.util.NoSuchElementException:No value presentжї»Уфц

УДБТ▒║Тќ╣Т│Ћ:

Optional result = list.stream().filter(obj -> obj == РђюDРђЮ).findFirst();
if (result.isPresent()) {
String a = result.get();
}

entry.title: ShellScript intro how to use for
entry.content:
ShellScript intro how to use for

жђЎу»ЄСИ╗УдЂС╗Іу┤╣тюеShellScriptsСИіуџёТїЄС╗цforтдѓСйЋСй┐ућесђѓ

for:1~100 СИЇСй┐ућетИХтЁЦтЈЃТЋИ:

for i in {1..100};
do
echo $i;
done

for:1~100 Сй┐ућетИХтЁЦтЈЃТЋИ:

start=1
end=100
for i in $(seq $start $end);
do
echo $i;
done

for:1~100 Сй┐ућетИХтЁЦтЈЃТЋИ№╝їтЈдСИђуе«т»ФТ│Ћ:

start=1
end=100
for ((i=$start; i<=$end; i++))
do
echo $i;
done

тѕЌтЄ║0~10тЂХТЋИ:

for i in {0..10..2}
do
echo $i
done

Output:
тЇ░тЄ║ 0 2 4 6 8 10

тѕЌтЄ║1~10тЦЄТЋИ:

for i in $(seq 1 2 10);
do
echo $i;
done

Output:
тЇ░тЄ║ 1 3 5 7 9

тѕЦт«│ТђЋтЈќУ╝ЃжЋиуџётљЇуе▒№╝їСИђтђІУ╝ЃжЋиСйєтЁиТЈЈУ┐░ТђДУ│фуџётљЇуе▒№╝їТ»ћСИђтђІУ╝ЃуЪГСйєжЏБС╗Ц
уљєУДБуџётљЇуе▒жѓёУдЂтЦйсђѓтљїуљє№╝їС╣ЪТ»ћСИђтђІУ╝ЃжЋиСИћтЁитѓЎТЈЈУ┐░ТђДУ│фуџёУе╗УДБСЙєтЙЌТЏ┤тЦйсђѓ

ухётљѕ№╝їСй┐тЄйт╝ЈтљЇуе▒УЃйУЄфТѕЉУффТўјУЕ▓тЄйт╝ЈуџёТёЈтюќсђѓ
